Peter, **Joe Biden and the radical Left have torn our nation apart.** \- Millions of illegal immigrants and dangerous criminals have entered our country through the southern border. \- Joe Biden is putting America last. \- Violent crime is spiking. \- And, most importantly, our country is failing. Your help is immediately requested on behalf of top Republican officials by completing the [**America First Identity Survey. **](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fd415361dea04e1e861e9b839c5531b0&_e=mXU5FXMc6fDgqXoTR21SsHQyPLkYgi6_gWjP7SDdPRL3Bq9arjEpg5Qtyj42P47_AMsYUNF9oOIN1jxeOY-da7iUxP76ej6c3oeKlWGWWdKPmyJkut1qQdKLGPFveUkvb0upEdhXK7Gj-GIlCjKhzR6DGyCh7tmMrDR_45DZKftGRdghIiOX_NDtxlD9SBLjmhu-kk8farXWjcZq0Ird33vlXN2LMdA9XPR6or6-r2b-F0TVgdExiLMzbc7r-6_SgbrYIlyZlnKvj078xiXU9Lx0bJazYb2FUXC8MDnvcQuTNHL7lR_IRM-gr09xskrQnm8rpzdiU64y8rkhnVrFpJ6UEtQhxu0x9cZQ0dbU29jXglDwrPNoJ-6S48acmMwk2Ue_e3FOCBAy2y_iB12dlMdJH6jX90uW4TIr5flgcBMfnsSAGf988PbGi86ATow2VcaEa9sOmiPrd9WxcXUbZPRTPMw2skD8SJYFYR8eX4w%3D) **[We need you to complete the America First Identity Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to STOP Joe Biden’s AMERICA LAST AGENDA and save our country in 2024. >> ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fd415361dea04e1e861e9b839c5531b0&_e=mXU5FXMc6fDgqXoTR21SsHQyPLkYgi6_gWjP7SDdPRL3Bq9arjEpg5Qtyj42P47_AMsYUNF9oOIN1jxeOY-da7iUxP76ej6c3oeKlWGWWdKPmyJkut1qQdKLGPFveUkvb0upEdhXK7Gj-GIlCjKhzR6DGyCh7tmMrDR_45DZKftGRdghIiOX_NDtxlD9SBLjmhu-kk8farXWjcZq0Ird33vlXN2LMdA9XPR6or6-r2b-F0TVgdExiLMzbc7r-6_SgbrYIlyZlnKvj078xiXU9Lx0bJazYb2FUXC8MDnvcQuTNHL7lR_IRM-gr09xskrQZ98L4Z_I8eHKogruzw-ep0k9dEKjf85ibHnpRWtLp4zzAhZVJzZAkTMfkYFSVBNgCiu2kqSZoGcr0Xv7wnrtiAEagjqjejaTWo8UEhjyxKraTPIJjAL8FgsulN6qUlJ8GuoNY7WYcBSudq67rlgzrWebpjcQ477TDhT3Zb81rxA%3D)**

subject: Did you see Tina on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

#

Hey Peter, did you get a chance to see Tina on MSNBC's _Morning Joe_? Tina is one of twelve women governors in our country – that’s the most ever at one time. She recently joined five Democratic women governors to discuss their jobs, their bond, and the challenges people are facing. [**So in case you missed it, watch this with your morning ☕ and see what Tina had to say on MSNBC in a roundtable discussion about being Governor of Oregon >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59629720/394669829/-651833201?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFhMjM4MC0xZmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SrA7NFbhp2W4_1ZX7JbIcRaAJ35NsIaoTLecXRn-SE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59629721/394669830/-651833201?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFhMjM4MC0xZmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SrA7NFbhp2W4_1ZX7JbIcRaAJ35NsIaoTLecXRn-SE=) | [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59629722/394669831/-651833201?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTFhMjM4MC0xZmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SrA7NFbhp2W4_1ZX7JbIcRaAJ35NsIaoTLecXRn-SE=)

Tina and her colleagues are leading the way to ensure our country works for everyone. Whether that’s creating more affordable housing so no one is forced to sleep on the streets, improving schools so every child is successful, or making mental health and substance abuse help more available — these incredible governors are rolling up their sleeves and making it happen.
Thanks,

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: We don’t know how to describe what Tucker Carlson said about Adam on his show last night - you have to read this for yourselves →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, what exactly was going through Tucker Carlson’s mind when
he went on this absolutely bizarre rant about Adam on his primetime Fox
News show last night?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]Tucker Carlson ranting about Adam Schiff on Fox News

“It’s not the cartoon demons you’ve got to worry about — it’s weak men in
positions of power. They’re the most dangerous. Men with no principles but the
desire for self-preservation. Hollow men, who live in terror of being revealed
for who they really are. Men who will do anything to save themselves. That’s who
you should be afraid of. And you can see that in our current moment — the
weakest are the most destructive... How old was Adam Schiff before a girl other
than his sister kissed him voluntarily? It makes you shudder to think about.
These are sad, insecure, broken men, filled with envy and bitterness from their
lonely childhoods. They hate you because they hate themselves. It’s not their
masculinity that’s toxic — it’s their lack of it.”

Yeah. It’s bizarre. And while we are not trained in whatever psychological
phenomena is at play here — it certainly looks like a bad case of
projection to us.

But there is method to Carlson’s madness. Adam has been calling out Tucker
Carlson and his boss, Fox News Chairman Rupert Murdoch, for their
complicity in the lies Fox was telling about the 2020 election. Carlson
not only resents Adam exposing his shameful duplicity — admitting
privately Trump lost but saying the opposite on the air — but he hopes to
sway California voters against Adam.

The last thing Tucker wants is Adam in the Senate with an even more
powerful platform to stand up to him and the other propagandists at Fox.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]Adam is sure to face many more attacks from Tucker Carlson and the
far-right media — as they get increasingly desperate. So Derek,
chip in any amount to Adam’s Senate campaign today to help us urgently
respond to Tucker and the far right’s attacks >>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em.o650ZW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’ll have much more to say about Tucker soon — after Kevin McCarthy gave
him exclusive access to the footage from January 6, 2021, he is sure to
misrepresent the footage to cover up the real threats to our democracy.

We won’t let them.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]So if you can chip in any amount to Adam’s campaign today, it will go a
long way towards holding Tucker and the insurrection enablers at Fox
accountable. Thanks for your help.

— Team Schiff

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em.4Qw1zC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230303_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1889%2E5257348%2ELFZMSX ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: BREAKING from the Hill (via VPP)
subject: George Santos UNDER INVESTIGATION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **BREAKING FROM THE HILL: House Ethics Committee launches George Santos investigation.**

_We’re closer than EVER to expelling LIAR George Santos from Congress for good._

**BUT Kevin McCarthy is SEETHING! When Republicans hold power, they introduce dangerous legislation that deteriorates people’s rights and disenfranchises entire communities. When Democrats hold power, they lift up communities, fight for working families, and protect the privacy of all American people. **Simply put: we must band together to stop Republican extremism.**

name: Ryan Frankenberry
subject: Take Action! WVGOP Attacking PEIA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tripod [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tripod]
Hi Friend,
As you know, the West Virginia GOP is harming hardworking West Virginians every single day in the Legislature. RIGHT NOW they are attacking PEIA benefits.
Hundreds of thousands of West Virginia families could see rate increases, spousal penalties, and reduced benefits as a result of the GOP's bill. Specifically, Senate Bill 268 puts PEIA benefits for 230,000 plan participants at risk.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yjjHAxxAYPU&t=1 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yjjHAxxAYPU&t=1]
WVDP live-streamed the AFL-CIO's press conference covering the damage that will occur under this legislation, and as you can see things were a little shaken. We're being a bit tongue-in-cheek about our tripod needs - but the best way to defeat these extreme Republican attacks on West Virginians is to showcase what they're doing.
With your support, we can continue making improvements to communicate with voters, organize volunteers, and most importantly recruit people to run against Republicans.
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tripod]
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tripod]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tripod]
Chip in to help us rebuild our infrastructure.
You can also click the button below to send a letter to your legislators and tell them to say no to SB 268. Our legislature should protecting our workers not taking away their benefits.
Take Action [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/stop-sb268?source=em030323&link_id=1&can_id=705a9ae3c95a566b607e187e78c94d09&email_referrer=email_1832501&email_subject=action-alert-stop-attacks-on-public-employees]
Onward,
Ryan Frankenberry
WVDP Executive Director

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| **The Truth About
The Coming Crisis**This might be your only warning...According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent.And our own government has ignored the the dire warnings of industry experts.Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis:**"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months.The loss will be beyond what you can imagine.As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Well, no need to worry anymore...When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits...You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.[**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself.Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651927%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jB9Lz1MHaMBu0JjLkEGO%2fA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651927%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jB9Lz1MHaMBu0JjLkEGO%2fA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651928%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DUdxseND0V3%2bUJOoukNreg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1781%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W9GtDrXADzKH%2fyKPqmVGBA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1781%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=W9GtDrXADzKH%2fyKPqmVGBA&sysid=1)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaer7ks650fhmuabg42u0o69qpcff9ufa0b9jg9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zma82d8jkj0qf14ufrokvmnqg5to4jk30e9l7j6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor1cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjamvp83fdb5odj35vib6d0dgh5st1uond9rt6l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor1cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2cphnrlruf4dr4tfb64cli6b0m0okol1ocgirg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor1cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about — the victimhood mentality.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeqamb7tcifhtihvv70b01ivf0rubjbgefh5ac78_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmupcqpsf2o16b8tl6v85h944ht4ejmmkc2rm1n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkaeucfsk8si479p20hti5m9ba4s40nmohfku9v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z66u4nu1bkf4rhba910p5mlh5ha26rus3krd0t2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z87tic20fckfpnk2difeo0hvga04ncvnd3fllg60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfou03i9f4g719u8j4u2dqaus6u7tblmpedfp408_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z64sf4o7in3tdgs23c3rrt82hv73pkrr9aesvcr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjarvqjkl64mtqh3uemc4gorp8tpcdtnk4s8vf90_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2kkqid7afh82iinunqfoqg5upqfr9t4ino3ac80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8ufu5th925610ns4cp1ktktr3r9fd9kvjmk3d98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd03914dlvqum2pf69e8reeod4uc720pgmustup8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znr053bfco03te4e8qetfhb5ejm1idiih87hlovg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5cph2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Wokeness killing the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z91eibi4tirjtq8uud1838s2vg0t9bgqbbf1ed2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrouo03b3ort5noltnl9endpl00rhp9bk3nsb9jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlglt8uusu2vags7abn7fim85nthdjvk03ils42o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1rhr3b07ef9bjvkr0fb3q7b2qk22ofd54kaan00_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc5hbpvmvtgn8t7gk4b6dhfkq81gdceamc6qfgs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhu7d8oeb7bc2oo89i4qpuj7qlmo5cdc3bmi56ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)**

For The American Dream,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2bp6vjhfq8vkbh7452j7c8vdd557q1onkepq65g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmtkl4kp731epnq9qh1q5gjrj75soldl616g848g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
---

| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5gn2hjtnnpi5b5qjs5ft7f8r878m5ens6j4lthg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zte12dqgjk668cc3r1h08g48l90q4ghae68vsf3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd6l0maanme4re8g927ngeg15ts8c1b68331g6q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor3c5h2bs)
---|---|---

clean_body: I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way. | Fellow American, Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes. I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: we are going through a national identity crisis. I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. | I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's "I Have Dream" speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character. I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies. You probably know me as the author of Woke, Inc. - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (Politico), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (The New Yorker), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (Axios , Bloomberg , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true. I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today. My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology. I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something. We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation. We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives: Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country. Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions. Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer. Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored. I think you believe in these ideals. I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqtfspkkbkm8suteoaokvgevovq57njsd84fadag_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq65ugqbvebqp5t9ss0kemrjkefducl6cam9530g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2alb0hshmdtc90n0r81763tbv7tc68tl2t0h1v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdkfcolieo47cs6fui51bb6u9mt85d9k5ls3tmm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh6eor5c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Milk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

|
---
| | | Friend, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. **I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. **

_If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our goals and keep up with the Democrats ' massive warchest._

I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - **and we need it today.**

**All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. _[The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to restore the American Dream.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuekka6ac85av4agrsrjpoofbnarr702ilquv8vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to restore the American Dream.")_**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zphcucvakivcgr62shbp7r533t0l5i19patv2om0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. **But I can 't do this without support from folks like you, friend.**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3rtm85t56kajrqqq90n3vb7i01912v1vqd64gro_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through,

Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zab4bef3abl3f5808trrbo4lvmgoras0rhqrrok0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb0u6ijpr13ndo42ffebm0uqcb9uff47jt9eh1g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhon55dp98jjnhqr5vfshvhdlkedobqrt6p72b10_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg6oihuet7er3edem8445tm2qde4fg3p9ck6gqm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfibmk8pva3ft0924ghf14tb1t1l83mtlrf4bv98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrqila4il9dian70gh6ujkee3jg2to6spomhsom8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs "STOP THE DEMS")
---
| | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
---

1101 30th St. NW
#125
Washington, DC 20007

[Privacy Policy](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsftvvmfdla005cbqm1m8t0opt9cc0oh701k56k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjh69ob1chh2bs)

### _Friday, March 3, 2023_

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1kdisapoqp2g7rdfgucl10a0lmgulpgmk0gtpig_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj68oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv6f66s0issdl1tir2qgdki0rdii3sdgu2ovt8go_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj68oj4c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4tt796u1qagombhd5h2ehrea9k36vv4e32euqc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj68oj4c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5v5cug169tba49e18up5vanmuipr8aek2pp80jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj68oj4c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Robert Duran IV
subject: Reminder: Introducing Robert Duran IV, National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | |
---
|
---
| Introducing Robert Duran IV, National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP
---
| Dear fellow Republicans of New Mexico,
It is with great pleasure that I introduce you to Robert Duran IV, the National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP. Robert is a native of Las Vegas, New Mexico and was raised in Santa Fe. He is a dedicated and experienced political professional with an impressive track record in managing and working with over 70 political campaigns nationwide, three sitting members of congress, and raising millions of dollars for Republican initiatives.
---
---
Robert is passionate about bringing change to the place he loves most - New Mexico. He believes that our state has the potential to be a leader in promoting Republican values, and he is committed to working with our party members to achieve this goal. His love for New Mexico is evident in his desire to make a positive impact on the state, and his dedication to the Republican party is unwavering.
We are excited to have Robert on board as our new National Executive Director, and we are confident that he will lead Rethink! GOP to new heights of success in New Mexico.
[Please join me in extending a warm welcome to Robert as he begins his tenure with our organization.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zn3q1FdNJ_qponzgPe1osLHPPCCmbSMwZ-TZnlJ0a966zHy0chyChdGq7ayMZftMgYwd324m797tB2M3zmaLs2Au4ay98MK3O2hoWEwEMLfOtu7u4dgy-0-r7CD7XspRZl8WeUAtLQimD5ejsE0MTQcCaVODVhAa_Ll4ccDsekTkQC7Zsrr5Ug==&c=y-0AsRQIZ8qrJ6kgg8cgKJOnf4sr7P6rwp9DTiCwM0j1kUKHe3Mv3A==&ch=H_ZHRizJ1bsOzkZ2FCJ3MUbn1F5QIA8aKlO46U9gtUXgRROE88wgQA==)
Best regards,
Rethink! He is a dedicated and experienced political professional with an impressive track record in managing and working with over 70 political campaigns nationwide, three sitting members of congress, and raising millions of dollars for Republican initiatives. Robert is passionate about bringing change to the place he loves most - New Mexico. He believes that our state has the potential to be a leader in promoting Republican values, and he is committed to working with our party members to achieve this goal. His love for New Mexico is evident in his desire to make a positive impact on the state, and his dedication to the Republican party is unwavering. Friend,

**Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.**_Just look at the southern border. _

We all know that the border is _wide open_ and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won't stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals.

We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can't build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. _That tells you everything you need to know about the government._

_With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We “woke” up from the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o5MYEXhZPuufmtkLq%2bqsDQ&sysid=1)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w3hrRqy%2bzZuqTX%2fZJo1plA&sysid=1)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n1XP39R7HOQY4nTRslWtZQ&sysid=1)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U%2fIitmfatkFC0tUAtF6Mjw&sysid=1)**

[** JOIN VIVEK →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n1XP39R7HOQY4nTRslWtZQ&sysid=1)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aUrsri2v6029Piy3np3rjw&sysid=1)**

For The American Dream,
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8i1vQjZw1gwQzjC4WF3IQg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n1XP39R7HOQY4nTRslWtZQ&sysid=1)
---

| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NxyrUGoWCox2X1idc4H6xQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C29yfG2WjExvBJoCCHN6QQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09738%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7aPkKmPPUVu6BuDyhxjBA&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

|

clean_body: I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way. | Fellow American, Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes. I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: we are going through a national identity crisis. I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. | I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's "I Have Dream" speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character. I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies. You probably know me as the author of Woke, Inc. - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (Politico), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (The New Yorker), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (Axios , Bloomberg , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true. I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today. My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology. I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something. We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation. We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives: Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country. Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions. Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer. Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored. I think you believe in these ideals. I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: R.I.N.O. Projects
subject: We can Do Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY R.I
body:
Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Headline") Peter: Congress has been in session for less than two months, and we already have Republicans caving into the left. With our razor thin margin in Congress, we don't need to be responsible for helping Joe Biden's radical progressive agenda succeed. The Democrats have been more than capable at ruining our country without help from the GOP. But Mitch McConnell has been busy standing with Joe Biden at press conferences lauding spending bills and then seen attacking Rick Scott over his proposal to reduce the size of our Federal Government. **Wait, isn 't that what Republicans have pledged to do?** You see, when you've got the Mitch McConnell types in the Senate and then the Ken Buck types in the House, we're destined to fail and that's not an outcome I'm willing to accept. **[Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more conservatives to reverse the damage we've experienced from Biden and the Democrats?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more
conservatives to reverse the damage we’ve experienced from Biden and the Democrats?")** When the Democrats controlled both Houses of Congress, they rammed every progressive bill through without consulting the GOP. In fact, they threw at least two GOP Members of Congress off Committees for the crime of speaking their minds. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Headline")So, when it's good enough for Democrats to punish Republicans for their rights to Freedom of Speech, why isn't it good enough for Republicans to punish a Democrat who has made numerous anti-American statements that included support for terrorism? **Individuals like Ken Buck clearly don 't have their priorities straight and that's why we need to remove RINOs like him from Congress and any other GOP member who don't put the principles of national security and our Constitution above their needs for fame or electoral outcomes!** It's bad enough that we've had Republicans voting in favor of Biden's spending bills, failing to block progressive appointees to his Administration and the bench, supporting Pelosi's J6 witch hunt and the two illegal impeachments of President Trump, all of which was used to suppress votes for the GOP in the 2022 Election, but we're not going to let it happen in 2024. **[Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for Democrats in 2024.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for
Democrats in 2024.")** During the 118th Congress, we're going to have plenty of opportunities to see those who campaigned on a conservative message, but failed when it counted, as well as those who are delivering on their promises for a conservative change. **It 's no time for us to be silent.** We need to make our voices heard and hold Republicans accountable to their commitment to reduce taxes, shrink government, reign in out-of-control regulations, appointing judges who adhere to the Constitution and ensure our families are safeguarded by local police and a strong military. One of the reasons the Red Wave didn't happen in 2022 was a result of RINOs like Mitch McConnell who worked against conservative candidates, or when our GOP candidates embraced the Pelosi witch hunts instead of our conservative principles. **[Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs
accountable!")** For Conservative Values, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "Autry Pruitt") Autry Pruitt
Conservative Author and Pundit | | [DEFEAT THE RINOS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392104:6K8auJGWN:m:1:3365131770:DF1422C94002DF25679B4AAA528C85DB:r "DEFEAT THE RINOS")

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zegrpqfqf3qftaf49cpca949uhati9dm91oh0ab8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o72c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv66koup1qfoe7o1nina188tqrj1cpoglt15huh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o72c9h2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6a0jeg83u6aug7uu5r9prps9uk8ue1phpcqpem0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o72c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrlr74blg4f7c7bsv1imb0333djkgequnsbvb1vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o72c9h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjvn5m7jnrfs4fu3rt0c9a3bc2gg859041okbrg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o72c9h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2ztjb24df50c6tu8gs06r8tpkvo9tbe1vfh4gdcf8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2u07gp8o1l9hp1c02hnunt7fhhmc8pmj34gkodo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctiecob0s9h649fg)

Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpunkjr6tem9ugurq03ik4v13ur7lpdt37mq2m6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o74c1h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcq307s9vu13qpbu4umd8j0j12o6lbta4cfulnpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj62o74c1h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=75ju2NF3hi0KtbanjkErhQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ag3W66Jwn4dRptj5d9c45w&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zqBrZP9SmQKJNxkQzGssHg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fbzsC%2fQBIqSrmJeiYCnngw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1795%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xoRY%2fkvZndBZX0IC44zQ7w&sysid=1)_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: A new American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13f8s0bb85rloqoq2u9svdcoipu4jaf991eoh1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdnleif0pn8eism9bv4drjvb84h2r237q3ah6p0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6am0id74ua048tcg5fu2569qs1qn1irsd6gu2qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ldi06djfi24o2vhumh7r2tm0bv48ns7jlqfr78_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5f0vg91ajtvh36q53augmn5uaquvshfh679loj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk7o3v7ru0p1osncl3l16ssto0sh39nkar3jh848_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)**

For The American Dream,
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zodkd7nglpni6oapo365618sq26jps1a6n5v4g4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7gaj9ua6e9qrnai3lje8rcc8mloh2jsteek9jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
---

| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5jnbjngkrl78q2nki32qq7gt92p9dda581cjoao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg4a48e0ufhqmmebl1a4pv27jq61321nmfdjtk5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfg747j0u4m60ioh2j35lmjkodnhc5amm9pii2j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk0bto9acor63ke76qmusnjee7h0q1r2ncp56b30_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj66or2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: R.I.N.O. Projects
subject: We can Do Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY R.I
body:
Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Headline") Peter: Congress has been in session for less than two months, and we already have Republicans caving into the left. With our razor thin margin in Congress, we don't need to be responsible for helping Joe Biden's radical progressive agenda succeed. The Democrats have been more than capable at ruining our country without help from the GOP. But Mitch McConnell has been busy standing with Joe Biden at press conferences lauding spending bills and then seen attacking Rick Scott over his proposal to reduce the size of our Federal Government. **Wait, isn 't that what Republicans have pledged to do?** You see, when you've got the Mitch McConnell types in the Senate and then the Ken Buck types in the House, we're destined to fail and that's not an outcome I'm willing to accept. **[Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more conservatives to reverse the damage we've experienced from Biden and the Democrats?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more
conservatives to reverse the damage we’ve experienced from Biden and the Democrats?")** When the Democrats controlled both Houses of Congress, they rammed every progressive bill through without consulting the GOP. In fact, they threw at least two GOP Members of Congress off Committees for the crime of speaking their minds. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Headline")So, when it's good enough for Democrats to punish Republicans for their rights to Freedom of Speech, why isn't it good enough for Republicans to punish a Democrat who has made numerous anti-American statements that included support for terrorism? **Individuals like Ken Buck clearly don 't have their priorities straight and that's why we need to remove RINOs like him from Congress and any other GOP member who don't put the principles of national security and our Constitution above their needs for fame or electoral outcomes!** It's bad enough that we've had Republicans voting in favor of Biden's spending bills, failing to block progressive appointees to his Administration and the bench, supporting Pelosi's J6 witch hunt and the two illegal impeachments of President Trump, all of which was used to suppress votes for the GOP in the 2022 Election, but we're not going to let it happen in 2024. **[Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for Democrats in 2024.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for
Democrats in 2024.")** During the 118th Congress, we're going to have plenty of opportunities to see those who campaigned on a conservative message, but failed when it counted, as well as those who are delivering on their promises for a conservative change. **It 's no time for us to be silent.** We need to make our voices heard and hold Republicans accountable to their commitment to reduce taxes, shrink government, reign in out-of-control regulations, appointing judges who adhere to the Constitution and ensure our families are safeguarded by local police and a strong military. One of the reasons the Red Wave didn't happen in 2022 was a result of RINOs like Mitch McConnell who worked against conservative candidates, or when our GOP candidates embraced the Pelosi witch hunts instead of our conservative principles. **[Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs
accountable!")** For Conservative Values, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "Autry Pruitt") Autry Pruitt
Conservative Author and Pundit | | [DEFEAT THE RINOS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392129:6vWtlJGxN:m:1:3365131770:B8BC4F1EB5FD120446B4908E8E01BBE8:r "DEFEAT THE RINOS")
