body:
I’ve selected you for the President’s Trust

---
| | | | | | | | Friend,
---
| Despite every witch hunt we’ve been viciously subjected to, our America First movement is stronger now than ever before.
---
| I have my __trusted__ supporters like YOU to thank for that.
---
| But as we get closer to the 2024 election, the Deep State’s attacks are only going to get more and more vicious.
---
| This battle isn’t ultimately about _me_. This is about America.
---
| **If the fate of our nation can now be decided through never-ending witch hunts, then we have lost our Republic.**
---
| _Because the stakes have never been higher, I’ve set up a brand new “PRESIDENT’S TRUST” to defend our movement._
---
| _I don’t hesitate when I say that you truly are America’s final hope._
---
| That’s why I have to ask you one last time to see if you’ll become a Founding Member of my President’s Trust — since I didn’t see your name on the roster, friend.
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: What’s worse than a 10-year-old needing an abortion? A 10-year-old not being able to get one. That sounds like a cruel, tasteless joke, but it’s just the law in Ohio now. Can you help overturn the ban?
body:
Abortion on the ballot in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2150ebe9-8bba-47fd-bf13-da7909e91659/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **A little 10 yr old girl. She should be going to school, playing with friends, enjoying life. Yet, first she's victimized by sexual assault, then Ohio victimizes her again, telling her she must birth the child of her violent atttacker at age of 10, or leave the state to have an abortion. This is sick.** **_Many of you are familiar with this story as it was nationally reported. You may not be familiar with the fact that 2 other pregnant minors raped in Ohio were confronted with the choice of torturing their young bodies and souls by giving birth to a child--as a child--or risk the emotional trauma of becoming a subject of FoxNews smears as they tried to secretly leave Ohio to end an unwanted pregnancy thrust upon them via violent attack._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02f00f03-2059-4f63-8451-e793891d07c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Will you join us in ending the Handmaid's Tale in Ohio, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86d58fdf-c484-4044-a339-b2f1a04f9666/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| _Ohio is fighting to put an amendment on the ballot in November, so there's no more horror stories like this, no more Christian Al Qaeda taking over womens' and young girls' bodies, ordering them to submit their souls to patriarchal autocracy._ **_THIS. ENDS. HERE. THIS. ENDS. NOW._** [**_Will you join us in ending the Handmaid's Tale in Ohio, stopping 9, 10, 11 year old girls from being tortured by chuckling, ghoulish, Republican men, supposed state legislators, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to help Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom pass this amendment!!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ea12dfc-f395-474d-a62b-9e9b0fb226fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_We'll never ask you for anything more important than this, than the lives of our young daughters._** Thank you, Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d1de6c1-4cc8-4f83-b175-32a86728d701/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Becoming Americans again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651936%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3V6mvuxPn9k6wH396%2bV%2fEg&sysid=1)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651937%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VviB4T30%2bvGk1Uj27MjKTA&sysid=1)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651938%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5KxUGyiO%2bOOw5XK%2bliS%2b%2fg&sysid=1)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651939%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hNcEQFvn%2fJV2%2bPU0CrIR4Q&sysid=1)**

[** JOIN VIVEK →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651938%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5KxUGyiO%2bOOw5XK%2bliS%2b%2fg&sysid=1)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651930%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FeFrfzbzumeV3QyRfLGldQ&sysid=1)**

For The American Dream,

clean_body: I’m a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way. | Fellow American, Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes. I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: we are going through a national identity crisis. I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. | I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's "I Have Dream" speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character. I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies. You probably know me as the author of Woke, Inc. - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (Politico), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (The New Yorker), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (Axios , Bloomberg , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true. I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today. My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology. I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something. We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation. We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives: Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country. Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions. Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer. Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored. I think you believe in these ideals. I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Brenden B.
subject: Will Michigan Democrats be held accountable?
body:
And now they are threatening to force through an anti-gun agenda that would make California blush.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlu4a7q6v3uurqgfr1qakdgvk901v4vh9fugil48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Democrats have gone mad with power in Michigan after achieving paper-thin majorities in the midterm elections.

And now they are threatening to force through an anti-gun agenda that would make California blush.

Bills for "Red Flag" gun confiscation, universal gun registration, and mandatory storage laws are already filed.

However, Democrats are threatening to take it even further -- salivating at the thought of passing an outright ban on commonly-owned semi-auto firearms.

We all know that a gun ban bill is already written and sitting ready on the desk of a Democrat lawmaker that won't even blink at the prospect of violating their oath of office and the U.S. Constitution by forcibly taking away your Second Amendment rights.

**[So join the effort by signing up and making your most generous contribution to help recall ANY Michigan lawmaker that votes for these radical anti-gun measures](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z044bllaog77ipovip5gr8fhvv0dtr3og3vkkfl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**.

As you know, "Red Flag" gun confiscation orders (SB 83-86) allow an old roommate, ex-spouse, ex-girlfriend, or ex-boyfriend to file an order against someone with very little evidence and strip someone of their rights without due process.

The so-called 'universal background checks' bills (SB 76-78) are de facto universal gun registration and will make it illegal to loan a close relative or friend a shotgun for hunting.

Finally, the storage laws (SB 79 and 80) disarm law-abiding Michiganders in their own homes and are probably already unconstitutional under the Heller decision.

But this kind of tyranny comes with a catch.

_Michigan law allows voters to recall their elected officials for their behavior in Lansing_.

And I certainly consider lawmakers violating their oath of office and the Constitution a recallable offense!

So if Democrats, or even any Republicans, decide to trample all over our Second Amendment rights here in Michigan, we don't have to wait until 2024 to hold them accountable.

With enough grassroots energy recall elections could be held as early as summer!

I'm already talking with local activists across the state and they are excited about the potential for holding Democrats accountable via a recall if they force their radical anti-gun agenda into law.

But even a massive swell of grassroots volunteers will not cover all the costs of a serious recall effort.

**[This is why I am asking you to stand with Michigan gun owners by signing up and financially supporting the recall of oath-breaking, anti-gun politicians in Lansing](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjmlsko12h2gubrttpo8m701vpstnij54vf3ivo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**.

**[Your contribution of just $20 or $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znv81d05cklq3aqt3ebna8cqplgerq021tjjr0ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)** will help Great Lakes Gun Rights kick-start any necessary recall on politicians who attempt to eliminate Second Amendment Rights.

And if you can afford it, **[$5 or even $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuim03h285f5t5j6pbvibddfkn3fk87ibdc7vvgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)** would go the extra distance to help gather the thousands of necessary signatures to trigger a recall election.

Our list of recall supporters is growing every day, and some have even been able to **[go all in with donations of $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrrg9qvu5ckksahktc9j791gsfgnho1fe4ev7ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)** or more!

But, I know that is not possible for everyone, especially with the rising costs of inflation.

So whatever you can afford, know that your contribution will help Great Lakes Gun Rights defend the Second Amendment from any oath-breaking lawmakers in Lansing!

Thank you for your support of gun rights here in Michigan.

**For Freedom,

Brenden Boudreau
Executive Director
Great Lakes Gun Rights**

Democrats have gone mad with power in Michigan after achieving paper-thin majorities in the midterm elections.

They are threatening a radical anti-gun agenda having already filed bills for "Red Flag" gun confiscation, universal gun registration, and mandatory storage laws -- while teasing an outright ban on commonly-owned semi-automatic firearms.

**[You can help Great Lakes Gun Rights kick-start the effort to recall any Democrat that violates their oath of office by voting to eliminate Second Amendment rights by making your most generous contribution, right away](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsarlkl4l02okkol7d8tamfm27nog2hhtctlv9n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**.

| **[Chip in $5>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc41gcegpns9bskl5m5pbjur774g8dv6mvkev9f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**
---

**[Chip in $10>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5taank82d6kc8fg00jlqmjvh566lmdo35sqsj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**

**[Chip in $20>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbmjovl5gag6r178pf7kg3ugol1mmnet6ofs4p50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**

**[Go"all-in" with $100 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6l5b2b0r0ej2ocdv8l070t7e0feb8ro3gsna6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)**

**Renew at another amount >>**

Donations are unlimited, but they are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Great Lakes Gun Rights ' mailing address is 2500 East Beltline Ave. SE, Ste. G #356, Grand Rapids, MI 49546. Its web address is [www.GreatLakeGunRights.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zschcnmq0cdmj25g1ta2n10h68n5l9qu0skk2p88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjj61ob7chh2bs)_

name: America First Policy Institute
subject: Brooke Rollins, Larry Kudlow, Kellyanne Conway, Bobby Jindal, Pam Bondi, Rick Perry
body:
Friend, we have the DREAM TEAM!

| | | If you open this email, your day is about to get brighter.
Why?
**Because America has NEVER had a more dynamic, principled, and qualified team working together to preserve the American Dream for future generations.**
You read that right...
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09733%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XIcL3RQOVhuv1ISGrsKZjw&sysid=1)
---
Brooke Rollins, former Acting Director of the Domestic Policy Council under President Trump, Larry Kudlow, former Director of the National Economic Council under President Trump, Linda McMahon, former Administrator of the Small Business Administration under President Trump, Chad Wolf, former Acting Secretary of Homeland Security in the Trump Administration, Kellyanne Conway, Senior Counselor to President Trump, Bobby Jindal, former Governor of Louisiana, Pam Bondi, former Florida Attorney General, Rick Perry, former Governor of Texas and former Secretary of Energy under President Trump, Dr. Alveda King, former State Representative for the 28th District in the Georgia House of Representatives, niece of civil rights leader Martin Luther King Jr., and daughter of civil rights activist A. D. King, Lt. General (ret.) Keith Kellogg, former Executive Secretary and Chief of Staff of the National Security Council in the Trump Administration, And many more America First leaders, all UNDER THE SAME ROOF, fighting for an America First Future at the America First Policy Institute (AFPI)! [_**Now, Friends, the only person we’re waiting on to join the team is YOU! Would you consider chipping in a tax-deductible donation of $25 or more today to join the America First Dream Team?**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09734%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hMWM6cwsVTVrsukJwHS8%2fQ&sysid=1) Since AFPI was founded, we’ve taken on Big Tech, fought to secure our elections and our southern border, protected students and empowered parents, and reminded MILLIONS of Americans that the America First movement is NOT dead and gone. But without your support, we’re running on borrowed time. That’s why we NEED you to step up to help us keep the America First movement alive! [_**Please, Friends, will you chip in $25 today?**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09745%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VgTfyuQF8plRtVE5zbRvQg&sysid=1) We thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, America First Policy Institute
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

| | | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78164%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sPuwfNHEk2%2f0p9oLI7LmoQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78175%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sdxt5WVvjt7LSbB1G7V02g&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78176%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qsUA1GjdysD%2b9xrak0OOzA&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iy8F1bJ9FKdEg%2f36uhxw%2fA&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hdbP5ZKiVQHtni47cmWKFg&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0OMZJCZgTB7VlbfNV7x%2bcQ&sysid=1)
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7604%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ugg0Lf%2bDZLTISjkvAKH4Jg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7604%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ugg0Lf%2bDZLTISjkvAKH4Jg&sysid=1)

name: Full Mag News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b2f5b746aa145469f4566b529b8cc2c&_e=gcpVEggIhAvJgsEFRcH6ySjgRxTVsZ3pjYqWN9QTxOyxCqkWqE8O71upQmXc2XQvcprS5hT5PYJ6GcCRciIajpQTeNozQI9f9kPInp0-M0mytqn_c7Q3BRlHZqY6E3tNA9gn08x9UXrDX7lmi_dhCXgseZ2F9MBPhEOcjF25Iw0w579DXGDfEcVLrbH_UCqE5ts6JzdAzovbaiv1ACziJeaSW7EzISUNxjr0QDvDkIsXoNSEu9RUTI12AgCu-YAGP3KUpNk9t0hkouLUdGDEfs-YkLCO-KjZrDB7RPLoyozDAypqmdttggwYM7EWMbwzEDeBQx0wSqfjMHSluZ076odiDkPYryWxTYZsT29-trFBk5cnB4cmSN4dXqKvMl6JUfcpipImeZWP-VA-gN9sOg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b2f5b746aa145469f4566b529b8cc2c&_e=gcpVEggIhAvJgsEFRcH6ySjgRxTVsZ3pjYqWN9QTxOyxCqkWqE8O71upQmXc2XQvcprS5hT5PYJ6GcCRciIajpQTeNozQI9f9kPInp0-M0mytqn_c7Q3BRlHZqY6E3tNA9gn08x9UXrDX7lmi_dhCXgseZ2F9MBPhEOcjF25Iw0w579DXGDfEcVLrbH_UCqE5ts6JzdAzovbaiv1ACziJeaSW7EzISUNxjr0QDvDkIsXoNSEu9RUTI12AgCu-YAG1fETH_WrNeNFGvMSjoOIyFRAEBJFjkCVv6UAv8LdkxtOymnTBwm7KGzqop-_2xYFN7BfX50tpR007Hczd4mdMEfNbxmHa7zg5g-F9FddJZKBkO4MKDAF9EaliWnji_XUMz9H04Hmxqg4QMzWIOpSRw%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b2f5b746aa145469f4566b529b8cc2c&_e=gcpVEggIhAvJgsEFRcH6ySjgRxTVsZ3pjYqWN9QTxOyxCqkWqE8O71upQmXc2XQvcprS5hT5PYJ6GcCRciIajpQTeNozQI9f9kPInp0-M0mytqn_c7Q3BRlHZqY6E3tNA9gn08x9UXrDX7lmi_dhCXgseZ2F9MBPhEOcjF25Iw0w579DXGDfEcVLrbH_UCqE5ts6JzdAzovbaiv1ACziJeaSW7EzISUNxjr0QDvDkIsXoNSEu9RUTI12AgCu-YAGE9yRSx36aNRICVqxu7tCbgjRPTZ49RAFPrmmf_9ddxxVbW9vBVq4u1mn2OOUWbI0V6NOsnHypH0PHei2os3X-aVcePBGA3bExyEkg8gYKRA1W5A7obU6pjQFTWylvwYW_rH3RpNryMPekVPvP8W97g%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b2f5b746aa145469f4566b529b8cc2c&_e=gcpVEggIhAvJgsEFRcH6ySjgRxTVsZ3pjYqWN9QTxOyxCqkWqE8O71upQmXc2XQvcprS5hT5PYJ6GcCRciIajpQTeNozQI9f9kPInp0-M0mytqn_c7Q3BRlHZqY6E3tNA9gn08x9UXrDX7lmi_dhCXgseZ2F9MBPhEOcjF25Iw0w579DXGDfEcVLrbH_UCqE5ts6JzdAzovbaiv1ACziJeaSW7EzISUNxjr0QDvDkIsXoNSEu9RUTI12AgCu-YAGNeL9ypyw90h2XOywGvRapVJsnPYoQlVFXsq5kiqsWRz72PZ9B-hM7A0adZW83-QDx_SfZ6Syf3B-HFPDvfcnPCK142eJ4i1R9ASCxqyvGQFPBxFxbJkaOuRFNjHVb3_Coi767XZna5I3Fl25edC36A%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b2f5b746aa145469f4566b529b8cc2c&_e=gcpVEggIhAvJgsEFRcH6ySjgRxTVsZ3pjYqWN9QTxOyxCqkWqE8O71upQmXc2XQvcprS5hT5PYJ6GcCRciIajpQTeNozQI9f9kPInp0-M0mytqn_c7Q3BRlHZqY6E3tNA9gn08x9UXrDX7lmi_dhCXgseZ2F9MBPhEOcjF25Iw0w579DXGDfEcVLrbH_UCqE5ts6JzdAzovbaiv1ACziJeaSW7EzISUNxjr0QDvDkIsXoNSEu9RUTI12AgCu-YAGTuV1m7s3tKRlERUgW7Jg4uUuLjRqXm97gPEg1aQgCvyFLj9fkiLNfGF9DVR91b2nVFo5oZjrDqo2V6IEezcbDwBs5sfHlqZ8uXQzHtz-ysKF7tKEhqdMMeJjJC0_Ac5vQfn2xBLbXrag5lc8yPnrLg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Liberals Come for Anna Paulina Luna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Luna was a leader for conservative reform in the House Speaker race.

| | |
---
|
---
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: U.S. Rep. **Anna Paulina Luna** (R-FL) has only been in Congress a few weeks, but she is already proving to conservatives around the country why we were right to support her candidacy last year.
Luna was a leader for conservative reform in the House Speaker race. She has been appointed to the crucial House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, where she is helping to lead congressional investigations into Covid relief corruption, the Hunter Biden coverup, and censorship of conservative speech on social media.
Rep. Luna is off to a great start in what promises to be a great career in public service. But you don't need to take my word for it. The left-wing media is vouching for her too!
Over Super Bowl weekend, the _Washington Post_ and other liberal outlets launched a coordinated attack against Anna Paulina Luna that shows just how much they fear her. name: Marco Rubio
subject: ??? Got milk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

|
---
| | | Friend, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. **I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. **

_If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our goals and keep up with the Democrats ' massive warchest._

I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - **and we need it today.**

**All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. _[The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to restore the American Dream.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z83jdk4qpdt5tqf2npl9kqlbbf7q67b8dftl855o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to restore the American Dream.")_**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsn9c0rqmdatoqblsr3jd8cluv5dq4sr6nmk2dtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. **But I can 't do this without support from folks like you, Friend.**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z747bv3eblemsf4ep4j3fnngf82u0jms65c65210_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through,

Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2ijbe5qoff3241ed7lpqk8655hd3vefon4jor88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "My parents lost their country. I'm not going to let us lose ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z40s9ad2hlaephis966iltkaf1m11v4p58q8fpb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zshfv1av3ee634gl1es7lrbo76kk0427bf53l2dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrandc45g8j0ve9e5264ld8a067u9a2aqm552l5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z43ct09v0ahdoqnsumjdfjfqsrune6sbdrdij6eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6dm24meup447sfss7o3figmok9jptgkn113np7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs "STOP THE DEMS")
---
| | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
---

1101 30th St. NW
#125
Washington, DC 20007

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztna94m63g5n0ql4vjr85k28tailk268msi4aqao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cjgmaor2c9h2bs)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I will always work for you

body:
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648656/394751722/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2383-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg2YmEwMi1hN2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM70ft1InGOhGD-yds-GxFgteW0WFKKISBvPeYKLDxw=)
Hey there,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $5 or more donation between Jacky Rosen and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648657/394751723/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2383-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg2YmEwMi1hN2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VM70ft1InGOhGD-yds-GxFgteW0WFKKISBvPeYKLDxw=)

name: Deborah Cosey-Lane, Secretary-Treasurer, ATU Local 308
subject: RSVP for the Party Builder Reception ASAP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
IDCCA's 2023 Party Builder Awards is just TWO days away, fellow democrat!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/m-c84igpDlBhYibfeS6MwDaiNVd8wIwlclVLsmGIn54=/XnItNBeWxb8BKAUm9GfCnqMdCtFLtS2mkeTrSibb6N8=?refcode=EM_EV_230304PB5_N_DCL_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

I wanted to reach out about the IDCCA's 2023 Party Builder Awards -- just **TWO** days away!

Democrats from across the state are coming out to celebrate with me and my friend, **Michael Macellaio** , President of the Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council. It's one of the most prestigious awards in Illinois, and I am so honored to be one of this year's recipients.

Celebrating with us will be our Honorary Event Co-Chairs Tim Drea from the Illinois AFL-CIO and Bob Reiter from the Chicago Federation of Labor. We are also excited to be celebrating with our Honorary Host Committee of Governor JB Pritzker, Lt. Governor Juliana Stratton, Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Secretary of State Alexi Giannoulias, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, Treasurer Mike Frerichs, Senate President Don Harmon, Speaker of the House Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Democratic Party of Illinois Chair Lisa Hernandez, and Cook County Democratic Party Chair Toni Preckwinkle.

I hope you'll join me at this year's reception at the iconic Chicago Navy Pier!

**[It is not too late to buy a ticket if you have not done so yet-- click here to RSVP now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/m-c84igpDlBhYibfeS6MwDaiNVd8wIwlclVLsmGIn54=/muY3a7vwZp8_HEAM3nW15paMpbGZtjxOfDteBQZwuxc=?refcode=EM_EV_230304PB5_N_DCL_90DO_6_NG_N_L1)** [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/m-c84igpDlBhYibfeS6MwDaiNVd8wIwlclVLsmGIn54=/muY3a7vwZp8_HEAM3nW15paMpbGZtjxOfDteBQZwuxc=?refcode=EM_EV_230304PB5_N_DCL_90DO_6_NG_N_B1&amount=10)
All proceeds go towards IDCCA's crucial work building the Democratic Party's grassroots strength and electing Democrats.

If you need more information about the event and where to get your ticket, check down below:

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards - THIS MONDAY**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 6th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm

**WHERE:** Offshore Rooftop, 1000 E Grand Ave, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs:** Tim Drea, President of the Illinois AFL-CIO & Bob Reiter, President of the Chicago Federation of Labor

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. JB Pritzker, Hon. Juliana Stratton, Hon. Kwame Raoul, Hon. Alexi Giannoulias, Hon. Susana Mendoza, Hon. Mike Frerichs, Hon. Don Harmon, Hon. Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Hon. Lisa Hernandez, and Hon. Toni Preckwinkle

**RSVP HERE:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023partybuilderawards](https://act.myngp.com/el/m-c84igpDlBhYibfeS6MwDaiNVd8wIwlclVLsmGIn54=/muY3a7vwZp8_HEAM3nW15paMpbGZtjxOfDteBQZwuxc=?refcode=EM_EV_230304PB5_N_DCL_90DO_6_NG_N_L2)**

Thanks, and I look forward to seeing you there!

Deborah Cosey-Lane
Secretary-Treasurer, ATU Local 308

Democrats from across the state are coming out to celebrate with me and my friend, Michael Macellaio , President of the Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council. It's one of the most prestigious awards in Illinois, and I am so honored to be one of this year's recipients. Celebrating with us will be our Honorary Event Co-Chairs Tim Drea from the Illinois AFL-CIO and Bob Reiter from the Chicago Federation of Labor. We are also excited to be celebrating with our Honorary Host Committee of Governor JB Pritzker, Lt. Governor Juliana Stratton, Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Secretary of State Alexi Giannoulias, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, Treasurer Mike Frerichs, Senate President Don Harmon, Speaker of the House Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Democratic Party of Illinois Chair Lisa Hernandez, and Cook County Democratic Party Chair Toni Preckwinkle. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=06b88000d48d4557914f06e171a54b0f&_e=eDhlDendHteiY7QcPeXQ4vchM0VFos5pmaP9e2yMI-FhyicYDJ35Xz6r0KvpOHEgUDFTykW_y7KCaJpD3H5lPQ9mntrtV7_Gfqxh4zLDcHmV2zDnB0-gTgBQBliF1Jg9Kyi3mWDwyb8y5OWZjtjQ-xSPACXQRKac6jVBPiKaVbG45OcIriPsEK9stYlEgK47V-_K4-W6JeBOgYVqLtjYbtnD0o4q5GehWO1S1vPrtU2WrfgM4Mwenlze9yQA_vRkvXM-TwEVBIg15Llhy3hfvxew-SAkexqLQFmoCmWu4_HypVHTU7w36Thy_PDYwXj93JbK2V2j77bdyN8GjUFlhgfc9AhT4V0HDeFPH-tikayYEb0qYynZXAJ9p0hWl4KVCY_S0CCUHPBscPGTcPv-Kw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=06b88000d48d4557914f06e171a54b0f&_e=eDhlDendHteiY7QcPeXQ4vchM0VFos5pmaP9e2yMI-FhyicYDJ35Xz6r0KvpOHEgUDFTykW_y7KCaJpD3H5lPQ9mntrtV7_Gfqxh4zLDcHmV2zDnB0-gTgBQBliF1Jg9Kyi3mWDwyb8y5OWZjtjQ-xSPACXQRKac6jVBPiKaVbG45OcIriPsEK9stYlEgK47V-_K4-W6JeBOgYVqLtjYbtnD0o4q5GehWO1S1vPrtU2WrfgM4Mwenlze9yQA_vRk4sRLD8Tk4iamuX7FUblvkI9XgXfxJL8KX7tydc2SAeyosFc6JpFo3iwyYVrmwZaeIOSncyNW6hGVyhW7TCwnw4S8i058s5CG4pG_JWf0vHPuICe9LrLp8UkVwOLEu2ZGbncswqSbY685o3PSCbKx0Q%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=06b88000d48d4557914f06e171a54b0f&_e=eDhlDendHteiY7QcPeXQ4vchM0VFos5pmaP9e2yMI-FhyicYDJ35Xz6r0KvpOHEgUDFTykW_y7KCaJpD3H5lPQ9mntrtV7_Gfqxh4zLDcHmV2zDnB0-gTgBQBliF1Jg9Kyi3mWDwyb8y5OWZjtjQ-xSPACXQRKac6jVBPiKaVbG45OcIriPsEK9stYlEgK47V-_K4-W6JeBOgYVqLtjYbtnD0o4q5GehWO1S1vPrtU2WrfgM4Mwenlze9yQA_vRkTQd8YZObpd-O8WuBys8P-aVTSi58F0zCpeOygruIKvuISctHt66UFnimbL4dB5NClgUZ-DX4heLCzxTU8fWGKuD-Xmqq4PCtCA7oNoa061i2ORgDBvvNfmK25ZDfKDdzkF6rTRDxhO-SsxMugxWniQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=06b88000d48d4557914f06e171a54b0f&_e=eDhlDendHteiY7QcPeXQ4vchM0VFos5pmaP9e2yMI-FhyicYDJ35Xz6r0KvpOHEgUDFTykW_y7KCaJpD3H5lPQ9mntrtV7_Gfqxh4zLDcHmV2zDnB0-gTgBQBliF1Jg9Kyi3mWDwyb8y5OWZjtjQ-xSPACXQRKac6jVBPiKaVbG45OcIriPsEK9stYlEgK47V-_K4-W6JeBOgYVqLtjYbtnD0o4q5GehWO1S1vPrtU2WrfgM4Mwenlze9yQA_vRkNbNtmPSqzzqUlGVnUBg6Rlug73cj6FRPz4NVYUJV2xqb0ow-VTQosgiOZhTU3HBTfO08qRVL8UlNRuKTqMfivdqvULb73dYH9Y131gOl43yyEAKkSx1llIT7lEd9g7-7g5aZlwO49AbyVswZ8MjXLQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=06b88000d48d4557914f06e171a54b0f&_e=eDhlDendHteiY7QcPeXQ4vchM0VFos5pmaP9e2yMI-FhyicYDJ35Xz6r0KvpOHEgUDFTykW_y7KCaJpD3H5lPQ9mntrtV7_Gfqxh4zLDcHmV2zDnB0-gTgBQBliF1Jg9Kyi3mWDwyb8y5OWZjtjQ-xSPACXQRKac6jVBPiKaVbG45OcIriPsEK9stYlEgK47V-_K4-W6JeBOgYVqLtjYbtnD0o4q5GehWO1S1vPrtU2WrfgM4Mwenlze9yQA_vRkLGiVOsk9Eem7Zk5zj40U4fjXQT2umzj5RvsVPVkAvC3P8yhKiNWW_f4wIwpNPjeLYf_XFnzRhxLIEFBFGkqzHt_YJ67lsol6ef1b2XETyyvWpOnnBPypKvmkWyWphWLxvPvV429d4WP21pB6-Araug%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbdf65da3e57486ab816244ebd78489d&_e=jIhVeWhmD4nuiu0wEIefawwZNniZJgKbpVHr_iuq7vrxFrdKy9aMs6bM-P1dZO4Qe6ETUAxLuvrgOQPKFfFAXgyzRkNpQKLf6BsgRvc377WbJ_7E9mb-_D9Fs1DxegUJX7qR5FRqCy_SSMTBwtj6pU-KYLccG_ue9GtUDOrWZBWekQr0XBVaSUwtEnJk75BtPXGnXSPG11uKoHLvnNX1I7ESYMT8EBuXqmSh6hDv-cgc9ctOLkaXOji9XQz3UYka-QgyNArY86TYkt3xV4wf0fHijKfm8rPxLjgg8C3sELBa2xeS2f_Z1L5R7uWtOMARNhRk9ErsQu-W0eekXKUTawhHFnfx7liRQp2lVSSY_LXuWyBd8Sso1j8_9psvjaX-omVJY6bxTI7XLrcxU9aR-waJwAO2XGg2b8XgWs-UYeDvvqVx0msur4GiV3FIuoTP)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbdf65da3e57486ab816244ebd78489d&_e=jIhVeWhmD4nuiu0wEIefawwZNniZJgKbpVHr_iuq7vrxFrdKy9aMs6bM-P1dZO4Qe6ETUAxLuvrgOQPKFfFAXgyzRkNpQKLf6BsgRvc377WbJ_7E9mb-_D9Fs1DxegUJX7qR5FRqCy_SSMTBwtj6pU-KYLccG_ue9GtUDOrWZBWekQr0XBVaSUwtEnJk75BtPXGnXSPG11uKoHLvnNX1I7ESYMT8EBuXqmSh6hDv-cgc9ctOLkaXOji9XQz3UYka-QgyNArY86TYkt3xV4wf0Yu7r-_nLvFo-KHoPZT4HbSz8ZDymFyJgdAR2l_XyV13rn1eYzjg2GaPGeLGvI8Y2zjSddhtfyP1UxkUteJIUs4vwXGyzfLB_YZil5nBcdlWNPd-iNaO7jj3t1qe0P1tFC9YQb-merH8OQltzJv2zF1di7S0OsPolDRUcTlK2rfK)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbdf65da3e57486ab816244ebd78489d&_e=jIhVeWhmD4nuiu0wEIefawwZNniZJgKbpVHr_iuq7vrxFrdKy9aMs6bM-P1dZO4Qe6ETUAxLuvrgOQPKFfFAXgyzRkNpQKLf6BsgRvc377WbJ_7E9mb-_D9Fs1DxegUJX7qR5FRqCy_SSMTBwtj6pU-KYLccG_ue9GtUDOrWZBWekQr0XBVaSUwtEnJk75BtPXGnXSPG11uKoHLvnNX1I7ESYMT8EBuXqmSh6hDv-cgc9ctOLkaXOji9XQz3UYka-QgyNArY86TYkt3xV4wf0WyHLp4DzkEm5y96oSn2zreF8XR7D51B3oyjpGPFIFUVdWVioZLYApA0C5I3KlCkH-LBGabfbosAFe5goc5Ap7J9v0KUhXLD0DGfX1gB8p3SLgO3Qovn6k1YQJvWRQ_-vUbHW3f4youyWxOBafY52pTAPORF_s8aw_SA0aHGeqfj)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbdf65da3e57486ab816244ebd78489d&_e=jIhVeWhmD4nuiu0wEIefawwZNniZJgKbpVHr_iuq7vrxFrdKy9aMs6bM-P1dZO4Qe6ETUAxLuvrgOQPKFfFAXgyzRkNpQKLf6BsgRvc377WbJ_7E9mb-_D9Fs1DxegUJX7qR5FRqCy_SSMTBwtj6pU-KYLccG_ue9GtUDOrWZBWekQr0XBVaSUwtEnJk75BtPXGnXSPG11uKoHLvnNX1I7ESYMT8EBuXqmSh6hDv-cgc9ctOLkaXOji9XQz3UYka-QgyNArY86TYkt3xV4wf0apLIF9hOHVTb4yop_QJds5Zc8Yr_HR3XSGY9Wdp4LEDE3ZB5WyUsc9M_CGC9tCo-cTOL3AluHyQ6swIKpYZnJpxDYeC62gyN4uuprVLgh3I54Yg-gbmFRK0h7t5fNSsSSeWfNpDWVK2YdildRTxKqGk6zJ2pdyLmoxQ2hzJrQq7).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
|

**DO YOU AGREE THAT EVERY LAW-ABIDING CITIZEN IS ENTITLED TO THE RIGHT TO SELF-DEFENSE?**

**[YES»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)**

**[NO»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392468:JfAjIJGmN:m:1:3365131770:6E8DC6D39A129D760580CC5FC95A497B:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert‘s mouth almost cost her congressional seat last year. Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24--send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarhthy's gavel.
body:
Adam Frisch for Colorado
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40085cc8-88c3-43b9-9cd0-b4ade6285ab7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Lauren Boebert just keeps talking. And talking. And talking some more. It's like she has a disease where she simply can't shut up.** **_In recent days she's openly rooted for Russia vs Ukraine, attacked Discover Card for tracking gun purchases to prevent gun violence as a Communist plot and sponsored a bill to get rid of the Department of Education._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70cfa69a-e1c7-40d5-a8e9-03af0246bfcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Look. If Boebert wants to go shooting her mouth off for the rest of her miserable life, I don't care. That she is doing it while getting paid six figures with our taxpayer dollars and using the microphone given to her to put more Americans and human beings around the world in danger, that I have a serious problem with._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75edad4a-0bde-48b1-99c4-702b9f3b3546/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Meanwhile, the accomplished Adam Frisch, who lost to this loud and stupid person by only 546 votes in a lean Trump district in 2022, is running again. Instead of the verbal diarrhea of Boebert, here is an example of the kinds of things to which Frisch is talking about:_ **_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24--send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarhthy's gavel._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8cbd145-39de-4da8-8119-0b7d6fbbf3f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication. Always.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44a3954c-87ae-4496-828d-15053a574d5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0f37fa9-5966-4ae5-929d-daae2a9da6f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: AOTL
subject: The structures of our democracy are at stake!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
3 states doubling down
|
---

Team -- I have to level set with you. Map manipulators and conservative extremists are doubling down on their anti-democratic tactics in 2023 and taking things a step further:
→ In North Carolina, conservative legislative leadership is taking political opportunity to gerrymandering maps.
→ In Ohio, a new bill was signed into law blatantly suppressing voting power.
→ In Texas, the state senate is expected to fail to improve the fairness of state legislative maps.
[PUSH BACK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59653178/394767565/1581849101?refcode=20230304_AOTL_F_3states_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4MmE2MDYzLWI2YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V28ol0SmgB3nG1m03nhg63v62qpHMkhukCWzzLfNpEg=)

Team,

We blinked and suddenly it's already the third month of 2023! From Eric’s perspective, we can’t even begin to imagine how rapidly time has flown to March.

To say a lot has happened since the swearing in the 118th Congress would be an understatement. We get it, friend, it's super easy to get lost in all of the noise. That’s why we have compiled a check list of things happening in Eric’s world so far this year:

That’s why we are already gearing up for whatever is thrown at Eric next. With our first FEC deadline rapidly approaching at the end of this month, we’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 before March 31. Please chip in so Eric can continue adding to his checklist – the future of our democracy and delivering for the American people is far too important. clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Team, We blinked and suddenly it's already the third month of 2023! From Eric’s perspective, we can’t even begin to imagine how rapidly time has flown to March. To say a lot has happened since the swearing in the 118th Congress would be an understatement. We get it, friend, it's super easy to get lost in all of the noise. That’s why we have compiled a check list of things happening in Eric’s world so far this year: Eric voted against Kevin McCarthy 14 times while he sat back and watched House Republicans erupt into chaos as they tried to elect a Speaker. After finally being elected speaker, McCarthy used his grip on MAGA extremists to boot Eric from the House Intelligence Committee. On the House floor, Eric called out Jim Jordan who was the author of an anti-Semetic tweet from the House Judiciary GOP Twitter page. Eric called out Matt Gaetz for bringing an alleged murderer to a Judiciary Committee meeting. All of this happened as a result of Gaetz thinking he could prove a point by trying to get Eric and his Democratic colleagues to vote against the Pledge of Allegiance. Team, let us remind you that through all of the noise, Eric has stayed committed to fighting back against the MAGA grip on House Republicans like Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan, and Matt Gaetz. That’s why we are already gearing up for whatever is thrown at Eric next. With our first FEC deadline rapidly approaching at the end of this month, we’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 before March 31. Please chip in so Eric can continue adding to his checklist – the future of our democracy and delivering for the American people is far too important. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: $5 → [] $15 → [] $25 → [] $50 → [] $100 → [] More → [] We can do this, Team Swalwell DONATE TO ERIC >> [] [] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! name: League of Conservation Voters
subject: Your LCV Membership Is About to Expire!
body:
This is urgent. Renew your membership today to keep protecting people and the planet.? ? RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP?
Your LCV membership is about to expire ??which means you?ll miss out on ways to help build political power for people and the planet.?

Will you renew your membership today? All it takes is one click: no donation required, no strings attached. RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9L-v_ ?
? By influencing policy, holding politicians accountable, and winning elections, the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) is organizing a powerful national movement to address the climate crisis, protect our democracy, and achieve environmental justice.
?
And?your membership https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s83P~?is what powers our work.?

In the last year, because of members like you who spoke out, volunteered, and supported our campaigns, we have been able to: DEFEND?bedrock environmental protections from polluter attacks ADVANCE?environmental progress in the states BUILD?a more racially and demographically diverse environmental movement ELECT?more leaders who will act on climate If you believe in our work to build a world where we clean up our air and water in communities hit hardest by pollution, safeguard public lands, curb climate change, and advance a more just and equitable democracy, then please,?renew your membership today. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C3Em~ There is still so much we have to fight for?and when we stand up together, we are strong enough to win.

Onwards,?

The Membership Team
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8614033&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDExMzI1NgS2&spReportId=MTcwMDEwODY1OQS2. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005

There is still so much we have to fight for?and when we stand up together, we are strong enough to win. Onwards,? The Membership Team League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information . Click here to unsubscribe from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, 7th Floor Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 ? ? ? ?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Riley Gaines in Jackson - an update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132856?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Riley Gaines is one of America’s top women athletes.** An All-American champion swimmer, she trained at the University of Kentucky with extraordinary determination not just for months, but for years.

**Then one day Riley discovered that the National Collegiate Athletics Association (NCAA) was going to allow someone who was born male to compete against women. The race that followed was, in my opinion, a farce.**
---
|
---
Riley Gaines, 12x All-American swimmer, speaking at our event in Jackson
| However ridiculous you might think the sport administrators were for allowing this to happen, this same issue is now recurring across America. Why?

**The insistence by ‘woke’ ideologues that someone born with male XY chromosomes can become a woman might be biologically absurd, but it has real consequences. **

There is nothing ‘progressive’ about demanding biological men are able to compete in women’s sports or use women’s changing facilities. What this ‘woke’ agenda does instead is undermine many of the advances made over the past century and a half to achieve equality between men and women.

**In a free society, anyone should be free to identify as whatever they want. But the rest of us should also be free not to treat someone with male XY chromosomes as a woman. **

**It is good to be inclusive. But that also means including those in our society who want to see policy made on the basis of biological fact, rather than biological fiction. **

Refusing to regard someone with male XY chromosomes as a woman should not be regarded as a ‘hate crime’, that can subject you to public prosecution (as now happens in Britain), or as an offence that can cost you your livelihood or job (as is now happening in the United States).
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bc6cf52286&e=5703353baa)
---
Click above to watch our interview with Riley Gaines
| **Riley Gaines came to Jackson this week to talk about her experiences, and to advocate for action to safeguard women’s rights.** You can hear what she had to say by clicking on the image above.

The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is at the forefront of the campaign for a Women’s Bill of Rights in our state. We are delighted with the support that the campaign has from lawmakers, and leading state-wide officials.

**What happened to Riley Gaines shows what happens when a small, vocal minority do all the talking and the rest of us stay silent. Society gets bullied into submission. Instead of staying silent, we need to join Riley in speaking out. **
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=53f64583ca&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| Ps. Betsy DeVos is coming to Jackson in a few weeks. Would you like to have lunch with her? [Click here for details](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bb2737d0e2&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d676ac4aa3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d676ac4aa3).

name: Hung Cao
subject: The three principles of leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ed1723d5370844d6a760176a8394a0a0&_e=fMKQEauVFmjetdBhzSlg8EGVMsdAYb1w5ZA7oyH1Usfyxd3pk-a_4RSlTrjupR-NzLA3_J6Y5vW1oFyAgvmnNcjPYEehVbQ_ACSIVY67epWEms9w7K71JW2DKIy6_635Z88OIygeY-qMY6s0cqboLh3HepBAuIFTk-b2GDV76fh3JRyEqJZWgHIOSzVsZdoX4VYykQWxJN-bOQz0aHQA7Te_Xw0DQvM57T-2sdv90unrPtuzO8BtCsUEo2usOL54kVdmCGAdgHsDIBXY48Fnjm0dQCuNYlu0noVpHGTJOK3yfgA0k04Ees_z2cB1mKaCG4hdE-ZVVEfv0M1jZfSyLytOeegaFjmT42eou0VwabNxJW5jmb9BdR-VbUtStqbG)
---
Peter, When I served for 25 years in special operations in the U.S. Navy, we were taught the three principles of leadership: **authority, responsibility, and accountability.**

They’re principles I take to every part of my life, Peter - **and they’re the same principles that Joe Biden abandoned during his disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan.**

Eighteen months ago, the world watched as Joe Biden let the Taliban completely take over Afghanistan, leaving them with $7.2 billion dollars in U.S. military materials.
---
[**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ed1723d5370844d6a760176a8394a0a0&_e=fMKQEauVFmjetdBhzSlg8EGVMsdAYb1w5ZA7oyH1Usfyxd3pk-a_4RSlTrjupR-NzLA3_J6Y5vW1oFyAgvmnNcjPYEehVbQ_ACSIVY67epWEms9w7K71JW2DKIy6_635Z88OIygeY-qMY6s0cqboLh3HepBAuIFTk-b2GDV76fh3JRyEqJZWgHIOSzVsZdoX4VYykQWxJN-bOQz0aHQA7Te_Xw0DQvM57T-2sdv90umcvIAhvz-9_rTxV1JNtLrDiezDjNisMcAR1WuYZdZ1FzXG_ZFIJcSXM4CuIJcbRdngVuoz5uHY985FSJYlijBdkVjnkXrwZ89Y0m0djRZdO9ELqap8Xw3Y_IvmvtlFE6BvyKgN0LIDW6OGBOjxVpNI)
---
As an American, I was horrified. And as a veteran, I was furious.
Joe Biden’s failure left American service members dead and plunged an entire country into chaos.
**Now, I’m doing what I can to ensure a failure like that NEVER happens again.**
