clean_body: | | | Peter, When I served for 25 years in special operations in the U.S. Navy, we were taught the three principles of leadership: authority, responsibility, and accountability. They’re principles I take to every part of my life, Peter - and they’re the same principles that Joe Biden abandoned during his disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan. Eighteen months ago, the world watched as Joe Biden let the Taliban completely take over Afghanistan, leaving them with $7.2 billion dollars in U.S. military materials. As an American, I was horrified. And as a veteran, I was furious. Joe Biden’s failure left American service members dead and plunged an entire country into chaos. Now, I’m doing what I can to ensure a failure like that NEVER happens again. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Wokeness killing the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdoIlkD9ybSYQUVtLiqrTbnpyBmMYl4c91RALSWR1d9M5LnoxJADN0NlvFSX5wbtOiE7v7r-H3kANii6hqlayIyfjtDTVjiTtmDqxE3-1gIIAANNbWkZVamkJ64rUJGDqhFx4-Dm6gLg60WLLk3jbIbmA%3D%3D)
---
|
Fellow American,

Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes.

I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: **we are going through a national identity crisis.**

I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. **[Today I am asking YOU to be a part of our movement.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdoRPnUDSgr3Dfy3JyidRLsQEfe_99guIdrO_Qbt5GdjxZjqQHFzN-F43CCo_JImKrDFYGVM_sVhoxCcn0VUzS8QusWbhvzV-6yxUyoWL_QQF8-ofc6pcaCDkikiuANI8X1nP5VQz0CNwpO4ajuz8X0XA%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN VIVEK ->**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdo3FakpHmEMKw1t_ypyVgAkyiwtFM4GsoaJGkGssx6QA17fvf2ZZt1CGATFHO3nv_w1F0QjGw3JTO0rjD3Yx9raFw9uwjH86s-cQrG_Aeann2W3c2ch_ngDbEhbiOVAM-eLtQf9hDMAemErbU9Ajff5Q%3D%3D)
---

I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's _"I Have Dream"_ speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character.

I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies.

You probably know me as the **author of _Woke, Inc._** - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (_Politico_), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (_The New Yorker_), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (_Axios_ , _Bloomberg_ , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true.

_I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today._

**My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology.**

**I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. [Will you help me launch my campaign by throwing in a contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdoXWjkhQgIsWQsDXpkYWy8ndI7573_DyTivTWIX0Rfwx0LxoAh2y_18yfJVKNKvmY1viok7AJE67KFiD5pxrLlv_K9487kbPgqxICImyoOBX1-QL1hChSJ5QMVgHQ_eoQpZXwHQ81owfjkpviJN71LAQ%3D%3D)**

[** JOIN VIVEK ->**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdovcTUbHlXZPZXOIHGkTu_8KQrPtNB591YeidXlAy2q0mnbMg8iU49pkvrpatvZgebIOcnR4geHe1Aw6w5O62IuF1sk7UDXI-oDltl8S-9HtbBz97ARcWZYVjuea_hvZI7GRCY2rWDlJpZgBMF5IbI6Q%3D%3D)
---

It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something.

**We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation.**

We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives:

Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country.

Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions.

Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer.

Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored.

**I think you believe in these ideals.** I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do.

**[I am running for President to save the ideals that made America great. Please stand with me in the fight to revive American exceptionalism by contributing $10, $25, $40 or another amount to help me launch my campaign.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdob6yAbeoBqMABuNO6q-_8U_bp1cVQSsulT-b6Kq9DoyhVCFMYcw7G9y4FBRftz6jJ8si9qZU7jdPnfEgZyPVCu8F8gSdt_b458s5vL1T7lZ8CHKcE7qCSqhkFNJXMdlogVB3ePl2W5hDbGdGJvmSrPg%3D%3D)**

For The American Dream,
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe92eb267c824b72a74d59c83fe45da4&_e=lBF-MzSB0N_wSKuJPrySRjbFBnGrmaJdNZQL_92sGhxQ9p0evwQJQaXTbCwbHcrc3eFYjYYUXSOh1wbbjVwAv1MrhijyoFanVk52q1PZm9cnrrYRl9HaucHTQQqruF2hT6lltmCuZZzVgYEDuc2--996IJyLkaABw_wzx8Ix4XA55MyWCi74fhU5i6jUXblpL_ifGL72Qol5OXL3yUyy80e1XBBqM5OZwD66AGrq84QK026JT3e5V2KR3WWlBpdoBVEIoK_bVdXeoILQG1gSP8yRXjDGPyDz-sXGUepkfFKUGZ5d2ln1tjbeoKZAiH5u8LniIJhuGwSlySE8n_uXXeijC-azwsxiuKK7ukLAHdmHRYFtWE7Rb3sZLLmfstCTbWWl9wRc4nKBGfswZsOghw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

clean_body: I'm a first-generation American, born and raised in Ohio. I got ahead based on merit, not my skin color. I am running for President of the United States to keep it that way. | Fellow American, Wokeness is a new secular religion that says your identity is based on your race and sexuality. This is destroying America in front of our eyes. I'm on a mission to stop it. I wrote two bestselling books and started a new company to take on wokeness on Wall Street, but we must do more and address the real problem: we are going through a national identity crisis. I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I launched my campaign for President of the United States to deliver an answer to the most important question of our time: what it means to be an American. | I remember when I was in 2nd grade and heard Martin Luther King's "I Have Dream" speech for the first time: America judges its children not on the color of their skin, but on the content of their character. I grew up in Ohio in the 90s to two immigrants who came to this country with almost no money. I was a skinny kid with nerdy glasses and a funny last name. Achievement was my ticket to get ahead. After graduating from Harvard and Yale, I went on to start a family and founded multibillion-dollar companies. You probably know me as the author of Woke, Inc. - or by what left-leaning outlets have called me, like "the intellectual godfather of the anti-woke movement" (Politico), "CEO of Anti-Woke, Inc.," (The New Yorker), or the "right's leading anti-ESG crusader" (Axios , Bloomberg , and others). I take their criticisms as a badge of honor because we are standing up for what is right - and true. I'm 37 years old. People my age and younger can't even answer what it means to be an American today. My peers have abandoned faith, patriotism, and hard work and instead embrace new secular religions like covidism, climatism, and radical gender ideology. I'm running for President of the United States of America to revive the ideals that made America great - and made America itself. If this is important to you too, then I need you to be a part of this movement. It's not enough to just be AGAINST something like wokeness... we need to be FOR something. We are on a mission to create a new American Dream for the next generation. We must embrace merit and excellence in every sphere of our lives: Merit in who gets into America. More immigrants like my parents, instead of illegal immigrants who break the law to enter the country. Merit in who gets ahead in America. You win in America not on the color of your skin, but on the content of your character and contributions. Merit in who governs America. I have a humble dream that the people who we elect to run the government should be the ones who actually run the government, not federal bureaucrats who multiply themselves like a national cancer. Merit in the marketplace of ideas. The best ideas win when no ideas are censored. I think you believe in these ideals. I think you believe your neighbors and colleagues believe in these ideals too, but you can't be sure because you're not allowed to talk about it anymore. We still agree on the basic ideals - at least most of us do. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Activist doctors are harming our children
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b457b685bea5463a8ff6738b2499cd01&_e=Rb9MWAtQ6QMzn8Lc4Z2kDmBEMvxBxLpPFJZfyXa89F0Ya_fEA3ZjiA6B7i2hv1cGvxAfw1wRsQzNABMPbsZ7urX_axzY3YVIU0SHf5GrYhRkK5cDq3jROGTuotaZuw-2uVy-2xj11lT3nwKUwmzPRAH3MgSwFhN04mMcfo0o7BhRZYN4yvwY6xbxsZ1yO6NGq3Ap2KIGa5VAafxuUJ_Bir2exHX5xS6x-54XGFkw0R8BVlcEGdCbJNRIqmg-4mt90PiJQOZ61CJdXepb3ZWWKBj7A9oOy13iGd7WR5qbg8IIA3CmdksVc2gXbw2lV_6YrXMpxCRJh544wHYE19ahIv2Tg7c3HMQ3CvwVOg31QUuz7iIeswgRsyXvwHi1fu5MY4we1cJuhsUcu-snJraC6g%3D%3D)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care."** Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. ** [**I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case's legal fund.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b457b685bea5463a8ff6738b2499cd01&_e=Rb9MWAtQ6QMzn8Lc4Z2kDmBEMvxBxLpPFJZfyXa89F0Ya_fEA3ZjiA6B7i2hv1cGvxAfw1wRsQzNABMPbsZ7urX_axzY3YVIU0SHf5GrYhRkK5cDq3jROGTuotaZuw-2uVy-2xj11lT3nwKUwmzPRAH3MgSwFhN04mMcfo0o7BhRZYN4yvwY6xbxsZ1yO6NGq3Ap2KIGa5VAafxuUJ_Bir2exHX5xS6x-54XGFkw0R8BVlcEGdCbJNRIqmg-4mt9isYGpgKiWBO96GqxWvkszTuGdqbziiOrGKuMACjqUM1nxZcWj1NOA5gzu_Tey6KGbq2c13g2AHySN5noR4249uec9zCmG-SDPjqomDveASmuZBPTAXWBmp_X1O1Ni5PUO14y183W2vN2xLMOy0ausA%3D%3D) Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. **But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** [**I 'm counting on you to join me in Chloe's fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b457b685bea5463a8ff6738b2499cd01&_e=Rb9MWAtQ6QMzn8Lc4Z2kDmBEMvxBxLpPFJZfyXa89F0Ya_fEA3ZjiA6B7i2hv1cGvxAfw1wRsQzNABMPbsZ7urX_axzY3YVIU0SHf5GrYhRkK5cDq3jROGTuotaZuw-2uVy-2xj11lT3nwKUwmzPRAH3MgSwFhN04mMcfo0o7BhRZYN4yvwY6xbxsZ1yO6NGq3Ap2KIGa5VAafxuUJ_Bir2exHX5xS6x-54XGFkw0R8BVlcEGdCbJNRIqmg-4mt9OxEUAKiIEhkyzZZtO4j4G44eSTyHqb3AJ2-adWCx7QVN2LbMXjea44q_KANQgeDqOslS4FITWhXgRUUZc8sXZpb0yxeU2aiSJRRt0MxzsMWUoBySYVJpkePxNOP_3wzBSxU_1LNUPC_io8RjFSzkfA%3D%3D) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.

Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to children across America. My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... ... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat. | | Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO Center for American Liberty | | | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: hope
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s about the American Dream.
#

Peter -
This campaign is about so much more than Ruben Gallego.
It’s about hope for the future.
It’s about the American Dream.
It’s about improving people’s lives.
If Ruben can win, it will prove once again that Democrats can vote to lower drug prices, expand voting rights, and raise the minimum wage even in the swingiest of states.
If Ruben can win, it will show that even the son of immigrants who grew up poor and cleaned bathrooms to afford college can get elected to the United States Senate.
It will show that a candidate relying on small-dollar donations can get elected to the Senate even against overwhelming money from payday lenders, hedge fund managers and the drug companies.
But Ruben cannot do this alone. No one person could. This campaign is about more than him and will require more than him to win.
You don’t have to donate to every email we send, but this is an FEC fundraising deadline and if you believe the things we’re fighting for are worth a few bucks, we’re asking you to chip in today.
[**Can Ruben count on you to contribute $3 or whatever amounts feels right for you today in order to help him win this election? This is an FEC deadline month, so your donation is so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230304-1-30-15gm&t=1&akid=434%2E734936%2E-P0Jbj)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c50ec329664c5b98299b85f7438178&_e=Fv5d1LTZ4DvCLqr9qL9HHpXk-n5xzmbQCupb6VrtV8MEBZxZSCuofjFECKMocCz7CWfm5ruPkta3FnXm2zXxoB-6jzkNXPNBYUxxNivhVydsP1O4PMCUqckfUz2XbTgxwbc0zReajQs0zUqpGwZ7nUc7bROb0cAcgau5czO_n8-Ci018KOb0bH1UylZn7fSjMmw6noJ-p8ovWxUbc7l2O-0jRTU2xmzfpb_9xBO_s0I9xZ_QejTkmYCg3YzTvZqcHMJ4Nr-8n9rN4wVcmkN6Sl5-3ogZ-6BBPEg2RI9KEbQ%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c50ec329664c5b98299b85f7438178&_e=Fv5d1LTZ4DvCLqr9qL9HHpXk-n5xzmbQCupb6VrtV8MEBZxZSCuofjFECKMocCz7CWfm5ruPkta3FnXm2zXxoB-6jzkNXPNBYUxxNivhVydsP1O4PMCUqckfUz2XbTgxwbc0zReajQs0zUqpGwZ7ne2G9_HZYpkXMEqhSHiT1PgDBhuoPacSm-nlS_VdNDQEWpKAbWfEZvTIcMnfhGvVzK9mJhFZKDrEPxXIsuR7QrO27AwAAvQGZC0gJPgg69TuLwVem75yGL8UwUDx255e2okM8M1YFh0g55XW03QyPCc%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0c50ec329664c5b98299b85f7438178&_e=Fv5d1LTZ4DvCLqr9qL9HHpXk-n5xzmbQCupb6VrtV8MEBZxZSCuofjFECKMocCz7CWfm5ruPkta3FnXm2zXxoB-6jzkNXPNBYUxxNivhVydsP1O4PMCUqckfUz2XbTgxwbc0zReajQs0zUqpGwZ7nUehzz7e0f3-WnPrQ3j4ELTCvuUE6104isLmhL0_kZNk1lSiu8sgGwvUV1BnYnLxm3LJK5fUXj0D05JUOGbl_E_jd8pfUhzpiisuJZvIv65dGr43gAY95le09hXlX0lk3OhJcQn21Bup1thLHHw5hUQ%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. name: Team Trone
subject: Add your name: Protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,
We’re writing about a matter that requires our attention and action – immediately. As you may have seen, some extreme members of the GOP have begun talking about ending the Social Security program entirely or cutting benefits to Americans who need it the most. They’re ignoring the fact that we pay for these benefits. They want to “pull Social Security up by the roots and get rid of it.”
We can’t let that happen.
The truth is, Social Security is one of the most successful programs in American history. It was designed to make sure the elderly do not fall into poverty. And it works. Without Social Security benefits, more than 22 million Americans — including over 1 million children — would fall into poverty. For millions of those who are struggling, Social Security is a lifeline, helping them stay safe and healthy. Almost everyone pays into Social Security from our very first paycheck, assured that the investment we made would be there when we retire. We need to send a clear message to anyone threatening cuts to Social Security: We won’t tolerate it.
ADD YOUR NAME: Protect Social Security now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/as3wlZ3p7U6ho1cRDfeYQQ2]
Will you take a minute to sign our petition telling our leaders to protect Social Security? Be sure to share it with friends and loved ones so they can sign it as well. We’re working hard to make a difference in American lives. We can’t let harmful proposals like this get in the way of our progress. Please sign the petition today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/as3wlZ3p7U6ho1cRDfeYQQ2]
Thank you for your support! Remember, our team is here to help get you the benefits you deserve. If you’re having any issues with Social Security, veterans benefits, or any other federal agencies, don’t hesitate to contact us by emailing info@davidtrone.com [info@davidtrone.com] .
Sincerely,
Team Trone
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

**In case you’re in need of a brief refresher on Letitia James’ history, here’s everything you need to know:**
**_FIRST_**** _,_** she became the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York’s attorney general – and she wasted no time going toe to toe with the most powerful and corrupt forces in the _nation_. She took gun manufacturers and sellers, Big Pharma, predatory landlords, and more to court – all so she could be a voice for the voiceless.

**_THEN_**** _,_** she ran for re-election – and you were right there with her every step of the way. You helped her defeat her well-funded, far-right opponent and _make history once again_ as the first Black woman ever to be re-elected to the office.

**_NOW_**** _,_** she’s continuing her fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, climate change, voting rights, and MORE – but she needs to know if you’re still on this team.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden’s Political Prisoners
body:
Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6th that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress. | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393457:Jc3tvJGcN:m:1:3331421248:6C8F42374CA49E2CA10628466CA30E8C:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393457:Jc3tvJGcN:m:1:3331421248:6C8F42374CA49E2CA10628466CA30E8C:r) Dear Peter,

For the last several months, I've been traveling back and forth to Washington, D.C. to assist, observe and report on our government's political prosecutions of the January 6th protesters.

I've met with broken families and watched judges trample the Constitution to defend their Criminal Enterprise that is our federal government.

I've sat in over 30 hours of hearings, my emotions range from gut-wrenching sadness for the defendants and their families, to complete outrage on the rulings and manipulation of the Department of Justice.

Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6, 2021 that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress.

But, despite promises from the new establishment GOP Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy, to release all the footage to the public, the footage still remains hidden from the public.

While you may have heard that the footage was turned over to Tucker Carlson, the reports are simply not true. No physical footage or hard drives containing footage was ever transferred outside of the United States Capitol to Tucker Carlson's office. Tucker Carlson and his staff have only been allowed to watch footage inside one terminal at the United States Capitol.

Once again, McCarthy has distorted reality to deceive the American public into thinking that he is fighting for them. As McCarthy continues to lie, good Americans remain incarcerated!

My work has come at a cost, but I strongly believe I have an obligation to continue to assist these Americans and their families. **[ Will you chip in to help cover my trial coverage and travel costs? ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393457:Jc3tvJGcN:m:1:3331421248:6C8F42374CA49E2CA10628466CA30E8C:r) **

I've spent weeks in D.C. hotels attending numerous J6 hearings and I'll need to head back to D.C. in April for more trials. [ **Any support you can provide will be greatly appreciated, and it will help get the truth out about the trials, which the media continues to ignore.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393457:Jc3tvJGcN:m:1:3331421248:6C8F42374CA49E2CA10628466CA30E8C:r)

Outside of Washington, the media of course and even **the Governors of Red States** have DONE NOTHING for the J6 defendants.

In Florida, we have the highest number of J6 defendants out of any state in the nation. I cannot begin to express how disappointed I am in Governor Ron DeSantis, who publicly stated his SUPPORT for the jailing and prosecutions of January 6 defendants!

We need to EXPOSE and hold every Republican politician accountable who fails to do anything about the political prisoners of the illegitimate Biden Regime!

And I say WE . . . because it will take all of us, good men and women standing strong against wrong.

You may have heard the quote attributed to Edmund Burke, "The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing."

In Washington, there are few good men and women left. That leaves us, the people, to take action.

That leaves us, the people, to take action!

So please, [ **help me continue reporting on the corrupt actions of the Biden Regime as I continue to support the J6 defendants and their families.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393457:Jc3tvJGcN:m:1:3331421248:6C8F42374CA49E2CA10628466CA30E8C:r)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

You were added to the system July 9, 2022.

---

Rev. Raphael Warnock, a Black progressive champion, has been fighting tooth and nail to make insulin more affordable for those who need it — **and we couldn’t be prouder of the work he’s done.**

**But here’s the thing, Peter:_We want more._**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, have you heard the news??? | We can’t stress enough how HUGE this news is. Rev. Raphael Warnock, a Black progressive champion, has been fighting tooth and nail to make insulin more affordable for those who need it — and we couldn’t be prouder of the work he’s done. But here’s the thing, Peter:We want more. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: A grassroots donation of just a few bucks has a lot of value and importance in what it can do to support Democrats nationwide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The DNC is building for 2023 and beyond, and counting on our support to make critical investments while it’s still early. | |
---
Derek, If you took one thing from my State of the Union address last month, I hope it’s this: We’ve made a lot of progress together in these past two years, but we’re not finished by any stretch of the imagination. **It’s time to finish the job, which means electing more Democrats across the country.** One of the most powerful ways you can help make that happen is by supporting the Democratic National Committee. The DNC supports the resources that Democrats running up and down the ticket are relying on to win in the coming years. A grassroots donation of just a few bucks has so much value and importance in what it can do to support Democrats nationwide. If you can, I hope you’ll support our party by donating $7 to the DNC.

clean_body: The DNC is building for 2023 and beyond, and counting on our support to make critical investments while it’s still early. | | Derek, If you took one thing from my State of the Union address last month, I hope it’s this: We’ve made a lot of progress together in these past two years, but we’re not finished by any stretch of the imagination. It’s time to finish the job, which means electing more Democrats across the country. One of the most powerful ways you can help make that happen is by supporting the Democratic National Committee. The DNC supports the resources that Democrats running up and down the ticket are relying on to win in the coming years. A grassroots donation of just a few bucks has so much value and importance in what it can do to support Democrats nationwide. If you can, I hope you’ll support our party by donating $7 to the DNC. We’ve got a long road ahead to finish the job of building a better America, but I’ve seen firsthand what the American people can do when we work together. Derek, your early support will ensure Democrats have what they need to win races in every corner of our country. And that’s exactly how we can keep delivering for families nationwide. Thank you for all that you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. URGENT: Experts warn over half of Mississippi rural hospitals are on the verge of closing.

It’s time to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals:
Do you agree? | [YES →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648020/394749732/2051053044?refcode=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGVjYTFiYTItYTViYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0kN2qiWGFgmyRs8_Ao0-Vuj_59fxKMNjX_Vm4DMOQTg=&emci=2a9ab88a-d1b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782) | [NO →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648021/394749733/2051053044?refcode=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGVjYTFiYTItYTViYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0kN2qiWGFgmyRs8_Ao0-Vuj_59fxKMNjX_Vm4DMOQTg=&emci=2a9ab88a-d1b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782)

* * *
Peter, Mississippi’s healthcare crisis is a ticking time bomb.

Too many of our hospitals are struggling to stay open at a time when we need them the most. And after years of neglect from Governor Tate Reeves, rural hospitals are vanishing.

**Now our state’s leading public health official warns that 54% of our rural hospitals are at risk of shutting down.**

The impact of these closures on the poorest state in the nation would be _catastrophic_.

Mississippians deserve better than this. They deserve a governor who will fight to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals, not kill them. Fight to protect our rural communities, not neglect them.

And stop playing politics with Mississippian lives.

Tate Reeves has proven time and again that he doesn't have the common sense or courage to do what's right. So the people of Mississippi must vote him out to save our rural hospitals.

Brandon Presley is running for governor to replace Tate and finally put an end to our state’s healthcare crisis. But we still have a long way to go. Until then, we want to know you're with us, Peter.
Take a moment to tell us: **Do you agree that It’s time for Mississippi to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals?**
[YES →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648022/394749735/2051053044?refcode=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGVjYTFiYTItYTViYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0kN2qiWGFgmyRs8_Ao0-Vuj_59fxKMNjX_Vm4DMOQTg=&emci=2a9ab88a-d1b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782) | [NO →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59648023/394749737/2051053044?refcode=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGVjYTFiYTItYTViYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0kN2qiWGFgmyRs8_Ao0-Vuj_59fxKMNjX_Vm4DMOQTg=&emci=2a9ab88a-d1b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0eca1ba2-a5ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782)

clean_body: Where do you stand? | = URGENT: Experts warn over half of Mississippi rural hospitals are on the verge of closing. It’s time to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals: Do you agree? | | ---|--- Peter, Mississippi’s healthcare crisis is a ticking time bomb. Too many of our hospitals are struggling to stay open at a time when we need them the most. And after years of neglect from Governor Tate Reeves, rural hospitals are vanishing. Now our state’s leading public health official warns that 54% of our rural hospitals are at risk of shutting down. The impact of these closures on the poorest state in the nation would be catastrophic. Mississippians deserve better than this. They deserve a governor who will fight to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals, not kill them. Fight to protect our rural communities, not neglect them. And stop playing politics with Mississippian lives. Tate Reeves has proven time and again that he doesn't have the common sense or courage to do what's right. So the people of Mississippi must vote him out to save our rural hospitals. Brandon Presley is running for governor to replace Tate and finally put an end to our state’s healthcare crisis. But we still have a long way to go. Until then, we want to know you're with us, Peter. Take a moment to tell us: Do you agree that It’s time for Mississippi to extend Medicaid and save our hospitals? | ---|--- Thanks for your response, Team Presley | | = = Follow along:** Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to _

**It 's Vice President Mike Pence, Peter, and I've had enough with the radical "defund the police" movement. **

The woke mainstream media and leftist organizations that prey on the demise of our officers are dismantling the safety of our communities. The good news is that I am taking direct action against the uproar of the anti-police movement.

This week I'll be speaking with Chief Reggie Burres in North Charleston, SC. The **[back the blue movement](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393503:JbOyKJGNj:m:1:3331421248:A7619DD4C0EBCDFFBB504BC16A9063E8:r "back the blue movement")** starts with meeting police chiefs nationwide and this week I start that dialogue.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers in the policies we champion in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Join me in the fight for mothers and working-class families across our country. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvaFwBm10zvYn7qlM0AuaPJVey4gHti2ZjJZMQrhkmTceJFUq0E5VoHoHe7JX7MntNsQrHsT7cgLPgFnFAoT_5q0dfncHPnvcIkG3BkcQbHYogLf2AJ13Kv3fp4FEbzaNx9OfjXfmIxE9Pd10qeJn7kkp-6FFEj5gWxjttoQVXJ3gycih7WHMb9_tdHrQYtPrgVbcor_ica0xwZR5NGfFJP1SdQrMiGfb-VUBxoMiRbVkw3KBUWr0tn5VVQu488nqL/3u7/-PNJFfr9Thei8w8fKldRNQ/h0/ArYmHGDIO_5226WoP8hqkjoa1qGCXncW6FwSyuAfgOI)
---
Friend, This Women’s History Month, I want to recognize how women in our country still face numerous challenges, including the persistent wage gap, the fight for our reproductive rights, and intimate partner violence. Our feminism must be intersectional, and that means recognizing and centering women who face oppression in multiple ways. For example, Black women face unjust disparities in maternal and infant health, particularly in my state of Michigan. As a mama myself, I refuse to accept the status quo where our systems keep failing my Black neighbors and other marginalized communities. So I co-founded and co-chair the Mamas' Caucus in Congress. In collaboration with the Black-led grassroots group Mothering Justice, we’re committed to advocating for mothers of color and their families. The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, including affordable childcare, national paid sick leave and family leave, closing the racial and gender wealth gap, and reproductive justice. [**Could you chip in $5, $25, $50 or more to join me in the fight for mothers and working-class families across our country?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBUy44udowW_dhj2p66e8NHp30PG1r-ZebI8WjF-TooIcGQdoSYV22U28FhfsJb2M7KrvS-3SpdgnYriWHqOjS_ZcprqBf5LR-QR04nsZTLwfSZfZGCQ-IOd13T2rPuL0plIoYqLGKL3r6z8YwSK3WqJMFd_38zOk56Fc-DfVtLXD3EaFTaVT-SnWQk9IowVhBYaBljmbL6SQ_H8mjrL48jfaPEsUFFGVMrN18cC36mxEkJCY14Ou99woBXRBvkJGCclUBUujPMhGRYFQnp5xu443Q6wqyxbisYFjFMlfgaJABtl-5RdPaMSWaXgulUyjob03wxrKMtTqJtzolefMurtCBioQDR9WdzN7495kmxLFuRcKyBWzFgI3kwdmkxDeRYQ6SAMe-mWEBBcBnR4Ke/3u7/-PNJFfr9Thei8w8fKldRNQ/h1/79y4sFEn67COjUnjRWeMx5TqwS1Xv5EKBk54j15MQfc) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBUy44udowW_dhj2p66e8NZu1NJNEzHEEidFgN1W_hSglppMNysHQ73uKOUZyZO3vxKBSb9qbY7PDBdxxCs81xUczmm9YRNNcbnlp4lEZN_XOfR5ZIAikqUUwGvayUn6QQ1nW1vXid-tp1M3I3Vh-9rEVpYjBlHzD-c-q_dXWpUEu_69KVo_kGBvbDA9VWuGjevS105ltLKqMfZ5Uwizwf1BLTvqoTf0Pngs-oMZl4BwA5BtrdtEOyERdC1-kz62APJqjQpob32J9OdAv8w5S1xR0tyRt6qiB1NH9ht6v8IsJ9DjABIyyj49Zb20WcvAl7_1QfibjG6KwsKoCVurScTtwXPR3YFc0xOOk_LbvOKu49vjR3Yv4gH0P3XK9CP3mnMDFv-uzwrKJIrMxptwnI/3u7/-PNJFfr9Thei8w8fKldRNQ/h2/8JcI09NxglaX1NMAXHFABMltIc1PhOu5XaBMjciR_-Y)
---
I’m also proud to be a founding member of the newly launched Congressional Dads’ Caucus, because all parents deserve a national paid family and medical leave program, affordable childcare, and policies that reduce poverty like reinstating the expanded Child Tax Credit.
The expanded Child Tax Credit cut child poverty by nearly half, but corporate Democrats and Republicans let it expire.
So I introduced the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would provide families with close to $400/month per child, cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system.
We need to invest in working-class families by ensuring they have the resources they need, including by putting money directly in people’s pockets.

clean_body: Join me in the fight for mothers and working-class families across our country. | | | Friend, This Women’s History Month, I want to recognize how women in our country still face numerous challenges, including the persistent wage gap, the fight for our reproductive rights, and intimate partner violence. Our feminism must be intersectional, and that means recognizing and centering women who face oppression in multiple ways. For example, Black women face unjust disparities in maternal and infant health, particularly in my state of Michigan. As a mama myself, I refuse to accept the status quo where our systems keep failing my Black neighbors and other marginalized communities. So I co-founded and co-chair the Mamas' Caucus in Congress. In collaboration with the Black-led grassroots group Mothering Justice, we’re committed to advocating for mothers of color and their families. The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, including affordable childcare, national paid sick leave and family leave, closing the racial and gender wealth gap, and reproductive justice. | I’m also proud to be a founding member of the newly launched Congressional Dads’ Caucus, because all parents deserve a national paid family and medical leave program, affordable childcare, and policies that reduce poverty like reinstating the expanded Child Tax Credit. The expanded Child Tax Credit cut child poverty by nearly half, but corporate Democrats and Republicans let it expire. So I introduced the End Child Poverty Act , which would provide families with close to $400/month per child, cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system. We need to invest in working-class families by ensuring they have the resources they need, including by putting money directly in people’s pockets. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. I will continue to advocate on behalf of parents and women, including trans women, many of whom are mothers and who face additional hurdles. With escalating anti-trans policies in the U.S., it’s more important than ever to fight for LGBTQI+ rights and gender justice for all. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Giffords.org
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Support gun safety legislation to protect our nation’s children
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby who would rather peddle a “guns everywhere” agenda than keep our kids safe
body:
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for kids and teens in America.
#

Friends -
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for kids and teens in America.
More than drug overdoses. More than car accidents.
Gun violence is **number one.**
This horrifying statistic shows the stranglehold that the gun violence epidemic has on our nation. How many more children must die before Congress takes action? We must do better for our children, for our future.
That’s why we’re starting a petition to call on our members of Congress to pass transformative legislation to keep our kids safe from gun violence.
[**Will you click here to add your name today and demand that our elected officials take action to protect our children from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_protectkids_mar23/?source=em230304-1-15&refcode2=4361.3935704.QoG5AP&akid=4361%2E3935704%2EQoG5AP)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_protectkids_mar23/?source=em230304-1-15&refcode2=4361.3935704.QoG5AP&akid=4361%2E3935704%2EQoG5AP)**
To protect our kids, we must pass safe storage laws to ensure gun owners properly store their firearms so that their children cannot access them and accidentally injure themselves or others.
We must pass universal background checks at the federal level to make sure we’re keeping guns out of the wrong hands, like people convicted of violent felonies.
We must pass extreme risk protection order (aka “red flag”) laws to prevent school shootings before they occur. Our kids should be able to attend school without fear of being a victim of another mass shooting.
However, we’re up against members of Congress bought and paid for by the gun lobby who would rather peddle a “guns everywhere” agenda than keep our kids safe.
**We cannot be silent. Children are dying and we must do something.**
[**Please, sign on today to demand that Congress has the courage to protect our children by prioritizing gun safety legislation.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_protectkids_mar23/?source=em230304-1-15&refcode2=4361.3935704.QoG5AP&akid=4361%2E3935704%2EQoG5AP)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_protectkids_mar23/?source=em230304-1-15&refcode2=4361.3935704.QoG5AP&akid=4361%2E3935704%2EQoG5AP)**
Thank you for using your voice. If we work together, we can be a better, safer nation.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4361%2E3935704%2EQoG5AP) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

In New Mexico, we look out for each other and show up when our communities need us most. We know that lasting change can only come about when we come together and fight for it. This campaign has always united around those New Mexico values. Our shared commitment to our values is how I was re-elected in 2018. It’s how we took back the Senate and White House in 2020 and expanded our Senate majority in November. And it’s how I know we can defend my Senate seat and hold our Democratic Senate Majority in 2024. Next year, reproductive rights, Medicare and Social Security, and climate action are all on the ballot. It will take a robust campaign budget to take on Republican attacks and win. **That’s why it’s so important that we bring in monthly donations to our campaign early on to build the momentum we need to defend the Senate and win up and down the ballot.** **[Let's unite around our common values once again at this important moment in New Mexico and our nation’s history. Can you commit to a monthly recurring donation of $5, $10, or any amount today to fuel our campaign each and every month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59649204/394754024/1070860144?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230304_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTdkMDExZS1hOWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQ88LsZF-KnT-ONkoNGvLHQpmRTr8NnSmmMZ-dLUOK0=)** | [CHIP IN MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59649205/394754025/1070860144?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230304_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTdkMDExZS1hOWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQ88LsZF-KnT-ONkoNGvLHQpmRTr8NnSmmMZ-dLUOK0=)

Knowing that we can rely on your donation on the 4th of each month will help power our campaign’s work to protect our Senate Majority and elect strong Democrats in New Mexico and across the country. Thank you.
— Martin

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: Straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Our very first FEC deadline is coming up on March 31 and we need your help to stay on track.
#
Peter: I know it’s Saturday morning, so I promise I’ll get straight to the point.
**Our very first FEC deadline is coming up on March 31.** That’s when our campaign will submit our fundraising numbers from January through March into the public record, and everyone — including our opponent, GOP insiders, and the media — will start to make judgments about the strength of Lucas + our campaign.
We need to prove that our movement is strong and ready to win. So it’s absolutely critical that we stay on track this month and finish the quarter strong.
**That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $15,000 online before the weekend is over —[and it’s why we’re asking you to chip in $10 or anything at all right now to help us make it happen.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28316?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28317?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28316?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt)
---
Lucas is running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate because Missourians deserve someone who will stand up and fight for them, not run away like a coward when things get tough — and as a 13-year Marine veteran, he’s ready to serve.
**We’re committed to building this movement without a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Pharma execs, so we’re relying on everyday people like you to fuel our campaign forward.[Will you chip in $10 or anything at all right now so we can hit our weekend goal and stay prepared for the fight ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28316?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt)**
**[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28316?refcode=em20230304-2845&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt)**
Thank you,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230304-2845-footer&t=11&refcode2=2845_614464_10Cvnt&akid=2845%2E614464%2E10Cvnt)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fae716a0a640419a87e70059f4d7677d&_e=hpN2NHeXXVU8jVVMBPjHxMT6wPNHdXrgwgYYoak8ue0H8pLzvm1aAjAJe4lHH3cM-RCMW4PfUtnzDvB38G8hd82GPrOk7VnGeSaOXNNUhcbOotfu2io8Jr-QpsMascSqm0E5DKOUsnMIdZwCiC4lq8zHgRVjfKQBUXnlJEWPXWutWxQzv5KLW-OYrOsKgQXddEETif6joE1W8hsztYsQ4jaaaEkxsYaeC6uszCosK59l4q05MaLkKNFJHYoXQk7AV2wADyR28X0UDMSGAt8zJORBfKmElNA1RIC_Aor2-4kf-UkU3KmhW0m1jv_GdiSVfU3TbQqDJR7XFPfsD9ceg-KiWgbzvwIw7jqamlRkelheMO3GTVnJqybPmbf3G-zXftKtseOPTC2Pq4Pl5P7bVw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fae716a0a640419a87e70059f4d7677d&_e=hpN2NHeXXVU8jVVMBPjHxMT6wPNHdXrgwgYYoak8ue0H8pLzvm1aAjAJe4lHH3cM-RCMW4PfUtnzDvB38G8hd82GPrOk7VnGeSaOXNNUhcbOotfu2io8Jr-QpsMascSqm0E5DKOUsnMIdZwCiC4lq8zHgRVjfKQBUXnlJEWPXWutWxQzv5KLW-OYrOsKgQXddEETif6joE1W8hsztYsQ4jaaaEkxsYaeC6uszCosK59l4q05MaLkKNFJHYoXQk7AHUVccKOFuTf4Zg_7yNhkieo8e62r9_a1zQ769tSXdAp4SqReIlaMyHaxymTY9iy75sufriYnXqFTFtSb_toUD8lUUNmIAoj2zg3xY1r75Qj3RTIB4qOmeXysb4-LB2yD-WwDBFnBOLkKndIctj01DA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fae716a0a640419a87e70059f4d7677d&_e=hpN2NHeXXVU8jVVMBPjHxMT6wPNHdXrgwgYYoak8ue0H8pLzvm1aAjAJe4lHH3cM-RCMW4PfUtnzDvB38G8hd82GPrOk7VnGeSaOXNNUhcbOotfu2io8Jr-QpsMascSqm0E5DKOUsnMIdZwCiC4lq8zHgRVjfKQBUXnlJEWPXWutWxQzv5KLW-OYrOsKgQXddEETif6joE1W8hsztYsQ4jaaaEkxsYaeC6uszCosK59l4q05MaLkKNFJHYoXQk7Av5IUPseoy2OsajipNXVTzigakcKehibLGFXFWmjo4yv0uZHybbacBY25xmxU4ekJCOHAYfS7hS-9Vij-fcoDsjM4QBHQyQRyN0hfpLppVvTUZinvvvheLgoYQemGo3fFgKipwT9LoWEO2WhPTNs-3A%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

| | | Fox News is not a real news organization. They don’t even believe their own BS, as recent revelations from the Dominion lawsuit have shown. [**And they should be kicked out of the White House press pool as soon as possible. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3079fda-eb2b-4a89-ada3-9d2e08e93d92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) They have no right to be in the White House briefings with actual news organizations. Having Fox asking absurd questions is like having Ron Burgundy or Ted Baxter in there (only evil). **Kick them out now!** [**Add your name: Tell the White House to Kick Fox out NOW! **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbc5d9ca-acd1-48ac-a6fb-a73da55568f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Sign our petition and demand fair and equal wages for women! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649887/394756212/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | [SIGN ON: DEMAND EQUAL PAY FOR WOMEN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649888/394756213/752037737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) **The sad reality is, team, that right now, we still live in an America that does not currently ensure women receive equal pay for equal work.** With prices rising to a four-year high and underemployment still a concern, women need fair wages more than ever. Here at the Fairness Project, we’ve dedicated ourselves to fueling ballot measure campaigns that guarantee livable wages to _everyone_. From Arkansas to Massachusetts, we’ve won campaigns in nine states that have brought higher wages to workers. **We’re fighting for social and economic fairness for all.** That’s why, as we kick off Women’s History Month, we’re asking you to join the celebration by taking action: [_**Sign our petition and demand fair and equal wages for women!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649889/394756214/752037737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [DEMAND EQUAL PAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649890/394756215/752037737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) **Right now in the U.S., a white, non-Hispanic woman only makes 83 cents for every $1 a white, non-Hispanic man makes._And team, the pay gap for women of color is far worse:_**
* Black women are paid on average 64 cents for every $1 a white man makes;
* Native American women make 58 cents on average;
* And Hispanic women make 54 cents compared to white, non-Hispanic men in the workforce.

**_Any_ person of _any_ gender deserves to make equal pay for equal work. [If you agree, will you add your name to our petition and demand fair and equal wages for women, friend?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649891/394756216/752037737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59649892/394756217/752037737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzY5NjRjNS1hYmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bNbW5SHCjZC_JJxK-8bda1-hYjbA0AY-XspC2Mw1_U=&emci=aa48d1c8-d7b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=576964c5-abba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) Thanks for signing on, team. Here’s to women everywhere finally getting the paycheck they deserve! — Fairness Project

subject: quick question
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sorry to bother you, friend – but your insight is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our next steps for March.
---
**Will you take just one minute to complete our new 2023 Priorities Survey? I had my team create this personalized link just for you:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/brown-2023-march-prio](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59650587/394758931/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk8-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4MDYwMS1hZWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iwa52XVx9Fi-XBjqJoKNd49lBPp2ouKuHptJ5WJQeSg=&emci=b4f1bcdc-eab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=52180601-aeba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)[/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59650588/394758932/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk8-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4MDYwMS1hZWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iwa52XVx9Fi-XBjqJoKNd49lBPp2ouKuHptJ5WJQeSg=&emci=b4f1bcdc-eab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=52180601-aeba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Fri, Mar 3, 2023
Subject: I’m asking you to weigh in
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59650599/394758938/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk8-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4MDYwMS1hZWJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iwa52XVx9Fi-XBjqJoKNd49lBPp2ouKuHptJ5WJQeSg=&emci=b4f1bcdc-eab9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=52180601-aeba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

clean_body: Sorry to bother you, friend – but your insight is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our next steps for March. Will you take just one minute to complete our new 2023 Priorities Survey? I had my team create this personalized link just for you: In solidarity, Sherrod \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Sherrod Brown Date: Fri, Mar 3, 2023 Subject: I’m asking you to weigh in | | | Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this: I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure your voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor. I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in. I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing: | | Thank you for taking the time. I’m looking forward to reading what you have to say. With gratitude, Sherrod Brown | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
