subject: Interested in running for office?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
The WSRP is partnering with the builders to host campaign schools in April and May of this year!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

| | Peter – These days, Marjorie Taylor Greene has started calling for a "national divorce" to sever the red states from the blue states. A bunch of her friends agree. It's obviously an awful idea. The last time someone tried it, we ended up in the bloodiest war in our country's history. **But what really infuriates me is that Greene and the rest of the MAGA crowd think that only some of their constituents deserve representation in Congress.** That's offensive, Peter. It's also cowardly. And dangerous. **[I'm fighting for a democracy that works for everyone, but I can't do it alone. clean_body: | | | | Peter – These days, Marjorie Taylor Greene has started calling for a "national divorce" to sever the red states from the blue states. A bunch of her friends agree. It's obviously an awful idea. The last time someone tried it, we ended up in the bloodiest war in our country's history. But what really infuriates me is that Greene and the rest of the MAGA crowd think that only some of their constituents deserve representation in Congress. That's offensive, Peter. It's also cowardly. And dangerous. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Look, my district is made up of all sorts of people with all kinds of political beliefs. And I'm honored to fight for every single one of them in Congress. Because the America I know – and the cities and towns I represent – are made up of people who support their neighbors no matter how they vote or how they worship. = Val = | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
| | This is Congressman Ronny Jackson, and I want to let you know **that you were lied to about the vaccine.**
They said it would stop transmission: LIE!
They said you would only have to get it once: LIE!
They said it would NEVER be mandated: BIGGEST LIE!!
Now they want to force EVERY child in America to get the untested Covid vaccine - including babies that are 6 months old.
These people are dangerous!!
I served as the White House physician for three Presidents. I'm more qualified to speak out on this than ANY politician in DC, but since I am outspoken, **I've become the number 1 target from the DC Swamp.**
I won't back down. Big Pharma, Big Tech, and their corrupt allies in DC want to DESTROY me and destroy YOU.

body:
Ex-House Speaker Larry Householder just testified in court and outright denied his alleged role in the largest bribery and money-laundering scheme in Ohio history.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59651799/394764013/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzAzY2YzNS1iMmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JK-JdS0LEIMQ8L-7gVwgRo-e8mEplZ9L-5W0ejAX-vU=) | Team,

Ex-House Speaker Larry Householder just testified in court and outright denied his alleged role in the largest bribery and money-laundering scheme in Ohio history.

➡️ He **_denied_** wining and dining FirstEnergy executives over a steakhouse dinner.

➡️ He **_denied_** demanding candidates back his bid for speakership or support specific legislation.

➡️ And he **_denied_** controlling the dark money group Generation Now.

Householder has made it clear his tactic is to deny _everything._

**But Ohioans deserve the truth.**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Judge Protasiewicz needs our support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
We are just ONE MONTH away from the Wisconsin Supreme Court General Election, and Judge Janet Protasiewicz needs our help to fight against a bombardment of right-wing cash and attack ads!
[**Can you please rush a $5 contribution between Judge Janet Protasiewicz’s campaign for the Supreme Court of Wisconsin and The Long Run? Every donation will help Judge Protasiewicz fight back against MAGA candidate Daniel Kelly.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=1&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Rush $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.qqKAKC&amount=5&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=2&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
This Wisconsin Supreme Court election is one of the most important elections of the year which will determine the ideological balance of the court and the future of many fundamental democratic freedoms — from abortion access to voting rights.
Electing Judge Protasiewicz to the court will be the difference between overturning Wisconsin's 1849 abortion ban or maintaining it, protecting voting rights or disenfranchising thousands of voters in a battleground state, and even whether the will of voters in the 2024 presidential election will be upheld or reversed.
This is not an exaggeration.
Not only is this race expected to be the most expensive judicial race in history, but MAGA millionaire mega-donors have already spent millions attacking Judge Protasiewicz on the air.
Whoever wins this seat will change the lives of millions of Wisconsinites and Americans, so we cannot back down.
[**Please, can you split a $5 contribution between Judge Janet Protasiewicz’s campaign and The Long Run? Your contribution will help to protect abortion access and democracy in Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=3&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.UgvC4Z&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=22&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.UXaEcN&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=23&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.foxo3F&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=24&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.PWswfL&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=25&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.tDBSiQ&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=26&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230304-1-t45&t=27&akid=4228%2E196590%2EHi9BTW)
Wisconsin and the entire country cannot afford to lose this seat and have our democratic freedoms stolen by MAGA candidate Daniel Kelly. So please make a contribution if you can afford it.
Thank you,
Mandela Barnes

subject: Make your voice heard - Respond to our survey for the 2024 Presidential Primary

body:
FOR: Ian Hines

| Peter, We hope this email finds you well. As you are likely aware, the **[2024 Republican Presidential Primary has already begun](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392726:JWLQhJG7N:m:1:3365131770:E315C28AA44BD51B3B01D0170DDF9C89:r)**. With the current administration under President Biden causing havoc and destruction across our great nation, it is more important than ever that we select a **STRONG** and **CAPABLE** nominee to lead the Republican Party in the upcoming election. That's where you come in. **[If the Primary Election were held today, who would you support for President of the United States?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392725:JWLQhJG7N:m:1:3365131770:E315C28AA44BD51B3B01D0170DDF9C89:r) **[Your opinion matters](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392726:JWLQhJG7N:m:1:3365131770:E315C28AA44BD51B3B01D0170DDF9C89:r)** , and we want to make sure that the Republican Party is fully representative of the views and values of America First Patriots like you.** | | [ RESPOND NOW ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392724:JWLQhJG7N:m:1:3365131770:E315C28AA44BD51B3B01D0170DDF9C89:r)
---
Please be advised that the deadline for completing the survey is 11:59 PM TONIGHT. We understand that you are likely busy, but it is _imperative_ that we receive as many responses as possible in order to accurately gauge the opinions of Grassroots Republicans in your state.
**[We urge you to take a few minutes to fill out the survey and let us know who you would support for President in the 2024 Republican Primary.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392725:JWLQhJG7N:m:1:3365131770:E315C28AA44BD51B3B01D0170DDF9C89:r)** Together, we can ensure that the Republican Party puts forth the strongest possible candidate to defeat President Biden and his disastrous policies.
Thank you in advance for your time and your response.
**Official Republican 2024 Survey**

| Light is the Best Disinfectant
Please share this email with those who question my conservative record. My rebuttal email [(click here)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MzMXrdRUz0bkFVqHLTkPxym_-ArfhsDW4gzCJsLvt9k6TH6KHHaWw0QYaUhow7vkXOmABljs_vbHPjsCuZgnaGxv_3foLfQaFaLqNq-Ixrln0EQ_DKl-hpuJvkVgH3S9O1QGYcj5Q11tcQWlZ_gQZO09EOdEikEzuZbSoHgNf6OaIbkw6BiH21wFDzdCYHMl12blG177IZcHSCdT2rP5iVWC2HpMBUxWVcM_9H1yIXsK8VMlGGHc1A==&c=Kqo9E2nk6tXQoT9J8JT5qDivtwAt472g9oQqip-CP2MOCFmeHVNzdA==&ch=KA6qMrNRUfnxm0jrkA9PQH1kvpJskU2_I-te7U5D-IuTq10Dhvdgxg==) with just facts to the Duane Adams attack email received more opens/shares than any email I've sent in 6 years.
John,
"Thank you for taking the time to address Duane Adams's email. Your email was factual, supported with evidence, concise, and did not personally attack your opponent but was professional. I respect and appreciate that approach. It is refreshing! I know a lot of time went into this email, time you could have spent elsewhere, but it was definitely necessary. Just wanted you to know we appreciate all you are doing ... you are doing a great job! Praying for you!"
T

The funny thing is Duane went on the radio with Joe Thomas just five days after his attack email on me and said he would not do mudslinging. Then today people received a laughable attack mailer at their home from Duane with four misleading points. I am 100 percent pro-life with a 100 percent pro-life voting record over six years. I am 100 percent pro-gun with a 100 percent pro-gun voting record over six years. Duane continues to follow the Democrat maxim, accuse others of what you are guilty of. I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will expose and hold my opponent accountable for his record.
After you read my email [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MzMXrdRUz0bkFVqHLTkPxym_-ArfhsDW4gzCJsLvt9k6TH6KHHaWw0QYaUhow7vkXOmABljs_vbHPjsCuZgnaGxv_3foLfQaFaLqNq-Ixrln0EQ_DKl-hpuJvkVgH3S9O1QGYcj5Q11tcQWlZ_gQZO09EOdEikEzuZbSoHgNf6OaIbkw6BiH21wFDzdCYHMl12blG177IZcHSCdT2rP5iVWC2HpMBUxWVcM_9H1yIXsK8VMlGGHc1A==&c=Kqo9E2nk6tXQoT9J8JT5qDivtwAt472g9oQqip-CP2MOCFmeHVNzdA==&ch=KA6qMrNRUfnxm0jrkA9PQH1kvpJskU2_I-te7U5D-IuTq10Dhvdgxg==), check out the ridiculous spin/ response below from Duane's consultant Chris Shores to my just facts email. Notice he left out a whole lot, including Duane has raised taxes in Louisa by 40% and used your money to buy influence across the county. He also left out Duane ran as a Democrat in Hanover County against Republican Frank Hargrove.

| 2023 Session Update Week 7 Final Week
---
| We Have Adjourned
---
| On Saturday February 25, the General Assembly adjourned Sine Die from the 2023 legislative session without a budget deal. Bills that passed are now headed to the Governor to sign, amend, or veto. The House and Senate will reconvene for "Veto" session on April 12th to review the Governor's actions.
Unfortunately, we were not able to repeal a law that links Virginia vehicle emissions to California vehicle emission standards. I'm running for State Senate so we can repeal this horrific mandate and un-California Virginia.
Everything is more expensive and Governor Youngkin's wants to give Virginians an additional $1 billion in tax cuts to the previous $4 billion the legislature enacted last year. This is the biggest disagreement between the two chambers.
If legislators are able to come to consensus, Youngkin could call the legislature back to vote on it in a special session. That budget amendment bill could bring with it a number of significant items, including another round of Youngkin administration-backed tax cuts for individuals and possibly corporations, as well as more funding for schools, mental health care, and more. Right now it is a battle between both sides over tax cuts.
Thank you, to my incredible team of staff and volunteers, for helping us to get things done every day for Virginia.
---

clean_body: Final Week of Session | | | | | | I am now out of session, I can now fundraise, and I can finally fully commit my time to the campaign! == == == | most read/ shared email I've ever sent. | Light is the Best Disinfectant Please share this email with those who question my conservative record. My rebuttal email == with just facts to the Duane Adams attack email received more opens/shares than any email I've sent in 6 years. John, "Thank you for taking the time to address Duane Adams's email. Your email was factual, supported with evidence, concise, and did not personally attack your opponent but was professional. I respect and appreciate that approach. It is refreshing! I know a lot of time went into this email, time you could have spent elsewhere, but it was definitely necessary. Just wanted you to know we appreciate all you are doing ... you are doing a great job! Praying for you!" T The funny thing is Duane went on the radio with Joe Thomas just five days after his attack email on me and said he would not do mudslinging. Then today people received a laughable attack mailer at their home from Duane with four misleading points. I am 100 percent pro-life with a 100 percent pro-life voting record over six years. I am 100 percent pro-gun with a 100 percent pro-gun voting record over six years. Duane continues to follow the Democrat maxim, accuse others of what you are guilty of. I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will expose and hold my opponent accountable for his record. After you read my email ==, check out the ridiculous spin/ response below from Duane's consultant Chris Shores to my just facts email. Notice he left out a whole lot, including Duane has raised taxes in Louisa by 40% and used your money to buy influence across the county. He also left out Duane ran as a Democrat in Hanover County against Republican Frank Hargrove. | | == for the Senator Dick Black letter on Democrat Duane and why Dick Black endorsed me in the Farmville Herald paper. | | ** I NEED YOU AND ALL YOUR FRIENDS TO SIGN UP TO BE A DELEGATE FOR MAY 6 CONVENTION == | == | | | | Endorsement List == | | | | It would be an honor to serve you as State Senator District 10. You can access an archive of previous newsletters at the bottom of each newsletter to learn more about me, my voting record, and what I've been up to. Sign up for the newsletter via email at john@mcguireforvirginia.com Please share this newsletter with potential delegates via the following weblink: == | "I prefer dangerous freedom over a peaceful slavery." -Thomas Jefferson | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 7 Final Week | We Have Adjourned | On Saturday February 25, the General Assembly adjourned Sine Die from the 2023 legislative session without a budget deal. Bills that passed are now headed to the Governor to sign, amend, or veto. The House and Senate will reconvene for "Veto" session on April 12th to review the Governor's actions. Unfortunately, we were not able to repeal a law that links Virginia vehicle emissions to California vehicle emission standards. I'm running for State Senate so we can repeal this horrific mandate and un-California Virginia. Everything is more expensive and Governor Youngkin's wants to give Virginians an additional $1 billion in tax cuts to the previous $4 billion the legislature enacted last year. This is the biggest disagreement between the two chambers. If legislators are able to come to consensus, Youngkin could call the legislature back to vote on it in a special session. That budget amendment bill could bring with it a number of significant items, including another round of Youngkin administration-backed tax cuts for individuals and possibly corporations, as well as more funding for schools, mental health care, and more. Right now it is a battle between both sides over tax cuts. Thank you, to my incredible team of staff and volunteers, for helping us to get things done every day for Virginia. | Success for Farmers | | A bill == I chief co-patroned with Delegate Webert passed the General Assembly to help farmers by extending the deadline to comply with the Chesapeake Bay Watershed Implementation Plan. | Rob Bell Retiring | | People say I am a hard worker, but they must not know the hardest worker Delegate Rob Bell. It has been an honor serving with Delegate Rob Bell in the Virginia House of Delegates. He had a huge impact on all of us and he fought harder than anyone to ensure victims had a voice. Thank you for your service to our Commonwealth Sir! | Kentucky Revival | == | The 2023 Asbury Christian revival at Asbury University in Wilmore, Kentucky gives me hope. It was sparked by students spontaneously staying in Hughes Auditorium following a regularly scheduled chapel service. The Asbury President Kevin Brown sent out a brief two-sentence email: "There's worship happening in Hughes that was shared all over social media. It was attended by approximately 50,000-70,000 people. Learn more ==. A missionary's perspective == | Success! | | A bill == I Chief co-patroned with Delegate Tata to define anti-semitism passed the House and Senate. | Session/ District Photos | | | | == | Go to == to download a delegate form for my May 6 convention. | | | | The hounds visited the Capitol with avid horse rider and First Lady Suzanne Youngkin. | A chocolate 45 pistol on the floor. #2A | What do you think of Trump going to Ohio and Biden going to Ukraine? | | | | Goochland Tea Party Monthly Meeting | | We met with some amazing patriots at a Leon Benjamin fundraiser including General Michael Flynn, Senator Amanda Chase, Don Blake, and more. Thank you Leon for stepping up to serve and advance conservative voices in the 4th Congressional District. | | We should all ban diversity, equity, and inclusion statements in our country. The word equity in this context is the same as communism. | | | | | My District 56 Page Anna sat in my seat when House Pages presented their resolution. | A view from the nearly renovated General Assembly building and the all new tunnel to the capitol under construction. | | You have to admit, this is pretty cool. Way to go Michael Jordan! #GOAT | | Communism: The number of people killed by the Communist governments of the world amounts to more than 94 million. The statistics of victims include deaths through executions, man-made hunger, famine, war, deportations, and forced labor. Anyone who resisted collectivization must be eliminated and were named as enemies of the State, of communism, and of society as a whole. Sounds like the woke diversity, equity (communist), and inclusion efforts we are dealing with today. Marxist ideologies infiltrating our country must be called out and stopped at all cost. | Prayers Needed in Louisa County | == | Louisa County mourns the heartbreaking loss of a Louisa County High School student Chase Luck. Four other students were in the hospital. Now one remains in critical condition. Please pray for those involved and their families == | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form. Please print the PDF form here ==, fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE. Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events. | == | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 6 == Week 5 == Week 4 == Week 3 == Week 2 2023 == Week 1 2023 == 2022 Newsletter Links == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Peter, **I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!** In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the _entire_ country. **Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:** Please, will you make a donation now and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert? No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off. But we proved them all wrong. With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.** **[No amount is too small: Click here now and make a donation to my campaign of whatever you can afford today. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Please open this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=18%2E35263%2EuO6SX4 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Thank you so much for opening this email, Peter. I know that it
might not seem like a big deal, but today, it’s really important. Let me
explain:

Keeping in touch with you over email is such an important part of our
campaign operation. Through emails like this one, we can reach folks
across the country in an instant with important updates on my work in
Washington and breaking news on our campaign. We can organize volunteers,
reach out about upcoming events, get your input through our surveys, and
ask for grassroots support, when we need it.

It’s a powerful tool, and it’s not one that I take for granted. You are an
incredibly important part of our team, and being able to talk with you and
hear your priorities means so much to me.

But when email providers make changes, or when we use a different system
to send these emails, we run the risk of landing in your spam folder —
which is the last place we want to end up!

I know it might sound strange, but opening and clicking on our emails
makes a huge difference for our campaign — helping us stay in touch with
folks in Wisconsin and across the country.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1004&akid=18%2E35263%2EuO6SX4 ]So Peter, can you please click this link (or the image below)
to show email providers that you care, that this matters to you, and that
you’re a part of our team? This link will bring you to our website.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1005&akid=18%2E35263%2EuO6SX4 ]ClientTitle

We’ve been using the same tool to send you emails for years now, but
recently we moved to a new platform, which can put our email placement in
a tricky spot. Email providers like Gmail need to see that folks are
opening and clicking our links so they don’t mark us as spam in your
inbox.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Thank you so much for opening this email, Peter. I know that it might not seem like a big deal, but today, it’s really important. Let me explain: Keeping in touch with you over email is such an important part of our campaign operation. Through emails like this one, we can reach folks across the country in an instant with important updates on my work in Washington and breaking news on our campaign. We can organize volunteers, reach out about upcoming events, get your input through our surveys, and ask for grassroots support, when we need it. It’s a powerful tool, and it’s not one that I take for granted. You are an incredibly important part of our team, and being able to talk with you and hear your priorities means so much to me. But when email providers make changes, or when we use a different system to send these emails, we run the risk of landing in your spam folder — which is the last place we want to end up! I know it might sound strange, but opening and clicking on our emails makes a huge difference for our campaign — helping us stay in touch with folks in Wisconsin and across the country. | Peter,

Happy March 4th – _**the only day of the year that’s also a call to action!**_

And more importantly, it’s my youngest daughter, Catherine’s, birthday!

Today, before we celebrate, I’m reflecting on the importance of our ongoing march towards a brighter future for my daughter and all children in VA-07.

In Congress, I’m working hard to deliver results for our community. The key investments I helped secure for our commonwealth’s infrastructure will increase Virginia’s climate resiliency – paving the way for a greener, healthier future for our planet and for generations to come. I’m leading the charge to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from buying, selling, or trading individual stocks – affirming public trust in our government and removing even the perception of impropriety.

And in the months and years ahead, I hope we will continue to march forth towards a brighter future for all Americans. There are many lingering challenges we face as a country, _**and I’m eager to tackle them each day in Congress.**_

[_**I hope that I can continue to count on your support for all the work that I do and that we’ll march forth together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59661742/394773241/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230304-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdlYzkxZGItYmFiYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cQTu5buvuGx6crK5_Ci_R10FuQxl-vRCTFp-yoy3Nag=)

body:
We’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today. | | |
---
| | **FIRST →** Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices to restore trust in the Court and hold justices – like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett! – accountable for possible conflicts of interest. **THEN →** The American Bar Association voted to SUPPORT a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. **NOW → We want to hear what grassroots Democrats think about this plan, so we’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today.** | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes
No
Unsure

After Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni Thomas, was exposed for her role in Trump’s Big Lie and close ties to anti-abortion rights groups, the impartiality of the Court was called into question. **But the American people deserve to feel confident in the Court!**
That’s why it's critical that the Supreme Court has a binding code of ethics, so that justices are held accountable for any potential conflicts of interest.

The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

Peter, We’re expecting a ruling to come down in the medication abortion case any day now — and we’re bracing for the worst. A Trump-appointed conservative judge in Texas has been asked to reverse FDA approval of mifepristone — one drug of the two-step medication abortion regimen, which accounts for **more than 50% of abortions in the United States. ** If the judge rules against mifepristone, this ban would take effect **nationwide** , even in states that protect the right to abortion like California and New York. It would have disastrous consequences for abortion access in the U.S., leading to backlogs at clinics and an increase in unsafe at-home abortions. We don’t know exactly when this ruling will be announced or what it will say, but we’re gearing up for the worst possible outcome. We’ll immediately mobilize and we want your support when we do. clean_body: | = Peter, We’re expecting a ruling to come down in the medication abortion case any day now — and we’re bracing for the worst. A Trump-appointed conservative judge in Texas has been asked to reverse FDA approval of mifepristone — one drug of the two-step medication abortion regimen, which accounts for more than 50% of abortions in the United States. If the judge rules against mifepristone, this ban would take effect nationwide , even in states that protect the right to abortion like California and New York. It would have disastrous consequences for abortion access in the U.S., leading to backlogs at clinics and an increase in unsafe at-home abortions. We don’t know exactly when this ruling will be announced or what it will say, but we’re gearing up for the worst possible outcome. We’ll immediately mobilize and we want your support when we do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, team. — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Electing a progressive mayor in Chicago, taking on the restaurant lobby, and much more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Progressive Mayor in Chicago? | St. Louis Slate — Vote Tues! |
Raise the Wage Actions | CPC vs. ‘Other NRA’ | CA Senate Poll | PRO Act
Push | SF Ed Alliance Launch | M4A Support in NJ | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1011&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

As the country's largest grassroots-funded progressive political action
group, Our Revolution relies on our members to organize on the outside and
inside the halls of power.

Make a recurring gift of $5 or more to support our work and get your
Official 2023 Our Revolution Membership card. For $10, you'll also get our
new sticker pack; and for $15, we’ll send you the Bernie HELP poster too!

For $27 a month, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag —
and at the $50 level, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution t-shirt,
too.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1012&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1013&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

ELECTING A PROGRESSIVE MAYOR IN CHICAGO!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1014&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

All eyes are on Chicago where progressive Brandon Johnson advanced to the
runoff for mayor this week — and we’re uniting our movement to help him
win!

As a former public school teacher, union organizer, and county
commissioner, Brandon knows the pain caused by disinvestment in education,
infrastructure, and health care — and the violence left in its wake.

His opponent? Conservative Paul Vallas, a public school privatizer who
calls himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat” — and he has the
rightwing mega-donors to prove it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8419?t=1015&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]Brandon Johnson can win this race. Help us mobilize nearly 100,000 Our
Revolution members in Chicago and make 250,000 voter contacts by Election
Day April 4!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1016&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

CALIFORNIA SENATE POLL

California is getting ready to elect a new Senator, and we want to know
who YOU think it should be?

So far, US Reps. Barbara Lee, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff have thrown
their hats in the ring. Tell us who you’re rooting for and who you think
should fill their seat in the House of Representatives!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/CA_Senate/?t=1017&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]TAKE OUR POLL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1018&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Tuesday is Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution and our
coalition have been working for years to build power and strengthen our
progressive majority!

The whole St. Louis Board is up for grabs in redrawn districts, and Our
Revolution has a powerful slate on the ballot to hold the progressive
majority — from re-electing Board President Megan Green to candidates in
10 ward races.

Our team is making 100,000 voter contacts in the city and hearing
excitement on the ground around our slate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1019&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Ward 7 candidate Alisha Sonnier began her [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8381?t=1020&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]activism following the
murder of Michael Brown in 2014. Since, she’s worked with Fight for $15,
Pro Choice Missouri, as political director for Green’s campaign, and now
on the St. Louis Board of Education.

“When we’re building this political movement, we’ve got to advocate for
our people and our city like it’s do or die because it is,” Alisha
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8420?t=1021&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]told us. “We can show a national model of what progressive leadership
can look like.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1022&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]PHONEBANK FOR OUR ST. LOUIS SLATE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1023&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be
working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville,
Dallas, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1024&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1025&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1026&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

We’re partnering with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage and raise
wages state by state. It’s time to pressure elected officials to pass
legislation — and we’re taking on the restaurant lobby to do it.

We have bills on the table in 3 states so far, and more are being
introduced. If you live in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8374?t=1027&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]New York, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8375?t=1028&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]Maryland, or [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8376?t=1029&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]Illinois,
call your State Reps!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1030&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

In Maryland on Thursday, Our Revolution leaders and restaurant workers
testified at a State Senate hearing to make sure tipped workers aren’t
left behind as we raise the wage in Maryland.

OR Maryland’s Hal Ginsberg noted: “Most Maryland minimum wage workers
received an hourly pay increase for 2023 from $12.50 to $13.25, but tipped
workers saw no change from the measly $3.63 they’ve been paid for 14
years.

OR Political Director Aaron Chappell emphasized that Raising the Wage to a
Living Wage was ranked in the Top 3 priorities by Our Revolution members.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1031&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service
industry and experienced low wages, please speak out — we’ll have your
back! Especially if you’re in one of the states we’re working in right now
to raise the wage — MD, MI, NY, IL, OH, AZ!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/tipped_wage_sv/?t=1032&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1033&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution members in Chicago joined Illinois state
lawmakers to rally around a new bill to phase out the subminimum wage for
tipped workers!

“Our workers here in Illinois deserve quality of life, and the subminimum
wage does not allow that,” State Rep. Camille Lilly to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8421?t=1034&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]Public News
Service.

Nearly 70% of Illinois’ 215,000 tipped workers are women — and 1 in 8 left
the industry during the pandemic.

“Tips were down, harassment was up,” said State Sen. Cristina
Pacione-Zayas. “Of those who have stayed, over half say they’re
considering leaving due to pay and exploitation of their labor.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1035&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

This Thursday — Our Revolution, One Fair Wage, and members of the
Congressional Progressive Caucus are gathering to organize to raise wages
for tipped workers!

Reps. Jan Schakowsky, Ro Khanna, and other House progressives will join us
for a breakfast and press event to support millions of restaurant workers
deceived by the National Restaurant Association into funding their own
wage suppression.

The ‘Other NRA’ used millions of dollars that workers paid for food safety
training to lobby against these workers' wage increases without their
knowledge. Help us hold them accountable!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8422?t=1036&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]RSVP NOW

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1037&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Call your Reps and demand they reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’. US
Reps. Ro Khanna and Greg Casar, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and others have
already signed on!

Thanks to NRA lobbying, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at
$7.25/hr for 14 years, and the federal tipped wage has remained $2.13/hr
since 1991!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1038&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1039&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

If you’re near Albany, NY on Wednesday, join us for a lobby day action in
solidarity with workers fighting for better pay and working conditions!

Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage, Raise Up, and the Fund
Excluded Workers Coalition in the fight for worker dignity in New York
through higher wages and stronger social safety net programs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8410?t=1040&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1041&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Worker activists joined Bernie Sanders and Senate Leader Chuck Schumer to
reintroduce the ‘Protecting the Right to Organize’ Act on Wednesday.

The PRO Act will empower workers to freely and fairly form a union and
bargain together for their rights at work. 71% of Americans support unions
and millions of Americans would join a union today if they could.

As a reminder, President Biden can use the power of the pen to deliver on
workers rights — as well as housing, higher wages for care workers, drug
prices and much more!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1042&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

CHAIRMAN BERNIE & FEDERAL FIGHTS

In response to growing pressure, Eli Lilly announced plans this week to
cap insulin prices at $35, and we’re joining Bernie in the push to drive
prices even lower.

As Chairman of the Senate HELP Committee and with our movement at his
back, Bernie also successfully shamed Moderna out of quadrupling vaccine
prices!

And, this week he’s preparing to subpoena Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz to
answer for his illegal union-busting. Bernie is also working to expand
Social Security and he introduced a bill for $60k minimum pay for
teachers!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1043&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]This is why our work matters! With Our Revolution and our movement
organizing on the outside, and Bernie using his position on the inside —
we are making a difference for people’s lives.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1044&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Because of worker organizing and grassroots pressure, 4 of the 5 big rail
carriers have now agreed to provide 4 paid sick days — the bare minimum,
but a start.

Also this week, US Reps. Ro Khanna and Chris Deluzio [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8423?t=1045&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]introduced a bill
to reduce the chances of another Norfolk Southern-like disaster.

“The lesson from East Palestine is clear,” said US Rep. Ro Khanna. “The
failure to properly regulate rail companies had disastrous consequences on
the lives of people and the environment. That's why we are introducing a
bill to enforce higher safety standards on our nation’s railways.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1046&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]Become a monthly donor to support Our Revolution and our
inside-outside work with progressive partners in Congress!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1047&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1048&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

LOCAL VICTORY! This week, Our Revolution New Jersey and our coalition
celebrated the passage of the state’s 15th local resolution supporting
Medicare For All!

Newark City Council unanimously passed our M4A Resolution, joining more
than 100 cities and counties around the country in sending a strong
message to end for-profit health care in favor of a universal system,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8424?t=1049&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5' ]Common Dreams reported.

“Medicare for All represents conscientious policy that is not based on zip
code, class, economic status, etc. but is designed for everyone,” said
Newark Mayor Ras Baraka, who championed the resolution alongside ORNJ and
our coalition.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1050&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

On Tuesday, Our Revolution New Jersey joined an action with workers at a
Strike Ready event at Rutgers University!

Our NJ Chapter is proud to stand in solidarity with Rutgers faculty,
students, union members and the entire community fighting for a fair
contract, living wages, equal pay for equal work, healthcare, and job
security!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1051&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

The new San Francisco Education Alliance, powered by Our Revolution, is
generating a lot of excitement!

At the big launch event Wednesday, organizers kicked off a campaign to
stop cuts to ESL classes and laid out the group’s vision: protect public
schools, advance progressive policies, mobilize the community, and hold
elected officials accountable.

“Pushing back against recalls and privatization, the alliance
is...‘proudly left-leaning, anti-racist, anti-fascist, anti-carceral, and
pro-union,’” the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8383?t=1052&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]San Francisco Standard reported.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1053&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1054&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Make a recurring gift of $5 or more to support our work and get your
Official 2023 Our Revolution Membership card. For $10, you'll also get our
new sticker pack; and for $15, we’ll send you the Bernie HELP poster too!

For $27 a month, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag —
and at the $50 level, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution t-shirt,
too.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1055&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1056&akid=4085%2E5885482%2EPPF3l5 ][IMG]

Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a
foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling
stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Progressive Mayor in Chicago? | St. Louis Slate — Vote Tues! | Raise the Wage Actions | CPC vs. ‘Other NRA’ | CA Senate Poll | PRO Act Push | SF Ed Alliance Launch | M4A Support in NJ | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As the country's largest grassroots-funded progressive political action group, Our Revolution relies on our members to organize on the outside and inside the halls of power. Make a recurring gift of $5 or more to support our work and get your Official 2023 Our Revolution Membership card. For $10, you'll also get our new sticker pack; and for $15, we’ll send you the Bernie HELP poster too! For $27 a month, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag — and at the $50 level, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution t-shirt, too. [ ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ ELECTING A PROGRESSIVE MAYOR IN CHICAGO! [ ][IMG] All eyes are on Chicago where progressive Brandon Johnson advanced to the runoff for mayor this week — and we’re uniting our movement to help him win! As a former public school teacher, union organizer, and county commissioner, Brandon knows the pain caused by disinvestment in education, infrastructure, and health care — and the violence left in its wake. His opponent? Conservative Paul Vallas, a public school privatizer who calls himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat” — and he has the rightwing mega-donors to prove it. [ ]Brandon Johnson can win this race. Help us mobilize nearly 100,000 Our Revolution members in Chicago and make 250,000 voter contacts by Election Day April 4! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CALIFORNIA SENATE POLL California is getting ready to elect a new Senator, and we want to know who YOU think it should be? So far, US Reps. Barbara Lee, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff have thrown their hats in the ring. Tell us who you’re rooting for and who you think should fill their seat in the House of Representatives! [ ]TAKE OUR POLL ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday is Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution and our coalition have been working for years to build power and strengthen our progressive majority! The whole St. Louis Board is up for grabs in redrawn districts, and Our Revolution has a powerful slate on the ballot to hold the progressive majority — from re-electing Board President Megan Green to candidates in 10 ward races. Our team is making 100,000 voter contacts in the city and hearing excitement on the ground around our slate! [ ][IMG] Ward 7 candidate Alisha Sonnier began her [ ]activism following the murder of Michael Brown in 2014. Since, she’s worked with Fight for $15, Pro Choice Missouri, as political director for Green’s campaign, and now on the St. Louis Board of Education. “When we’re building this political movement, we’ve got to advocate for our people and our city like it’s do or die because it is,” Alisha [ ]told us. “We can show a national model of what progressive leadership can look like.” [ ]PHONEBANK FOR OUR ST. LOUIS SLATE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’re partnering with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage and raise wages state by state. It’s time to pressure elected officials to pass legislation — and we’re taking on the restaurant lobby to do it. We have bills on the table in 3 states so far, and more are being introduced. If you live in [ ]New York, [ ]Maryland, or [ ]Illinois, call your State Reps! [ ][IMG] In Maryland on Thursday, Our Revolution leaders and restaurant workers testified at a State Senate hearing to make sure tipped workers aren’t left behind as we raise the wage in Maryland. OR Maryland’s Hal Ginsberg noted: “Most Maryland minimum wage workers received an hourly pay increase for 2023 from $12.50 to $13.25, but tipped workers saw no change from the measly $3.63 they’ve been paid for 14 years. OR Political Director Aaron Chappell emphasized that Raising the Wage to a Living Wage was ranked in the Top 3 priorities by Our Revolution members. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service industry and experienced low wages, please speak out — we’ll have your back! Especially if you’re in one of the states we’re working in right now to raise the wage — MD, MI, NY, IL, OH, AZ! [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Last week, Our Revolution members in Chicago joined Illinois state lawmakers to rally around a new bill to phase out the subminimum wage for tipped workers! “Our workers here in Illinois deserve quality of life, and the subminimum wage does not allow that,” State Rep. Camille Lilly to [ ]Public News Service. Nearly 70% of Illinois’ 215,000 tipped workers are women — and 1 in 8 left the industry during the pandemic. “Tips were down, harassment was up,” said State Sen. Cristina Pacione-Zayas. “Of those who have stayed, over half say they’re considering leaving due to pay and exploitation of their labor.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This Thursday — Our Revolution, One Fair Wage, and members of the Congressional Progressive Caucus are gathering to organize to raise wages for tipped workers! Reps. Jan Schakowsky, Ro Khanna, and other House progressives will join us for a breakfast and press event to support millions of restaurant workers deceived by the National Restaurant Association into funding their own wage suppression. The ‘Other NRA’ used millions of dollars that workers paid for food safety training to lobby against these workers' wage increases without their knowledge. Help us hold them accountable! [ ]RSVP NOW ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Call your Reps and demand they reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’. US Reps. Ro Khanna and Greg Casar, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and others have already signed on! Thanks to NRA lobbying, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25/hr for 14 years, and the federal tipped wage has remained $2.13/hr since 1991! [ ]CALL YOUR REP! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] If you’re near Albany, NY on Wednesday, join us for a lobby day action in solidarity with workers fighting for better pay and working conditions! Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage, Raise Up, and the Fund Excluded Workers Coalition in the fight for worker dignity in New York through higher wages and stronger social safety net programs. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Worker activists joined Bernie Sanders and Senate Leader Chuck Schumer to reintroduce the ‘Protecting the Right to Organize’ Act on Wednesday. The PRO Act will empower workers to freely and fairly form a union and bargain together for their rights at work. 71% of Americans support unions and millions of Americans would join a union today if they could. As a reminder, President Biden can use the power of the pen to deliver on workers rights — as well as housing, higher wages for care workers, drug prices and much more! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CHAIRMAN BERNIE & FEDERAL FIGHTS In response to growing pressure, Eli Lilly announced plans this week to cap insulin prices at $35, and we’re joining Bernie in the push to drive prices even lower. As Chairman of the Senate HELP Committee and with our movement at his back, Bernie also successfully shamed Moderna out of quadrupling vaccine prices! And, this week he’s preparing to subpoena Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz to answer for his illegal union-busting. Bernie is also working to expand Social Security and he introduced a bill for $60k minimum pay for teachers! [ ]This is why our work matters! With Our Revolution and our movement organizing on the outside, and Bernie using his position on the inside — we are making a difference for people’s lives. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Because of worker organizing and grassroots pressure, 4 of the 5 big rail carriers have now agreed to provide 4 paid sick days — the bare minimum, but a start. Also this week, US Reps. Ro Khanna and Chris Deluzio [ ]introduced a bill to reduce the chances of another Norfolk Southern-like disaster. “The lesson from East Palestine is clear,” said US Rep. Ro Khanna. “The failure to properly regulate rail companies had disastrous consequences on the lives of people and the environment. That's why we are introducing a bill to enforce higher safety standards on our nation’s railways.” [ ]Become a monthly donor to support Our Revolution and our inside-outside work with progressive partners in Congress! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] LOCAL VICTORY! This week, Our Revolution New Jersey and our coalition celebrated the passage of the state’s 15th local resolution supporting Medicare For All! Newark City Council unanimously passed our M4A Resolution, joining more than 100 cities and counties around the country in sending a strong message to end for-profit health care in favor of a universal system, [ ' ]Common Dreams reported. “Medicare for All represents conscientious policy that is not based on zip code, class, economic status, etc. but is designed for everyone,” said Newark Mayor Ras Baraka, who championed the resolution alongside ORNJ and our coalition. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] On Tuesday, Our Revolution New Jersey joined an action with workers at a Strike Ready event at Rutgers University! Our NJ Chapter is proud to stand in solidarity with Rutgers faculty, students, union members and the entire community fighting for a fair contract, living wages, equal pay for equal work, healthcare, and job security! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The new San Francisco Education Alliance, powered by Our Revolution, is generating a lot of excitement! At the big launch event Wednesday, organizers kicked off a campaign to stop cuts to ESL classes and laid out the group’s vision: protect public schools, advance progressive policies, mobilize the community, and hold elected officials accountable. “Pushing back against recalls and privatization, the alliance is...‘proudly left-leaning, anti-racist, anti-fascist, anti-carceral, and pro-union,’” the [ ]San Francisco Standard reported. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ][IMG] Make a recurring gift of $5 or more to support our work and get your Official 2023 Our Revolution Membership card. For $10, you'll also get our new sticker pack; and for $15, we’ll send you the Bernie HELP poster too! For $27 a month, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag — and at the $50 level, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution t-shirt, too. [ ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out! [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Be part of the action and help our coalition push Congress and the White House to deliver for all of us. Even with a Republican-controlled US House, we can get action on our progressive priorities. [ ]JOIN THE FEDERAL ACTION TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Progressives now hold leadership positions in 20 state parties, and we’re fighting for progressive leaders in Nevada, Florida, and Oregon! Join our Party Transformation Team to help make a more democratic party that’s responsive to the grassroots. [ ]JOIN THE TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Phonebank Force is recruiting! Join our growing team of callers to build support for policy campaigns and help elect progressives up and down the ballot! [ ]SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re so proud to work on Josh Hawley’s team and represent some of the hardest working American patriots. Josh has always made it clear that his priority is hardworking Americans, and that’s why we’re reaching out to you, Peter. Right now, Josh needs your input, and we really value your opinion. | | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:

Peter,

It’s been almost two months since Emilia was officially sworn into Congress to serve Northeast Ohio – _and she’s only just getting started on delivering for our community._

_Team Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: Take a Deep Dive into LCV's 2022 National Environmental Scorecard
body:
2022 LCV _Scorecard_ is live! |
---

** **
|
_" What a year of historic progress! In 2022, pro-environment majorities in the House and Senate showed the world what's possible when our leaders are committed to delivering the action on climate, clean energy, jobs and justice voters demand."_ _**-LCV Senior Vice President of Government Affairs Tiernan Sittenfeld**_ [](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMWbb-GSV/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0)
Earlier this week, LCV released the _2022 National Environmental Scorecard_. [Have you checked the scores for your members of Congress yet? ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_XXvDQ2/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0)

2022 was an exceptionally productive year in the pro-environment, pro-democracy-led House and Senate. This year's _Scorecard_ includes dozens of votes on impactful climate and environmental policies, in addition to a number of votes on legislation that would strengthen democracy and safeguard equity.

**This year 's _Scorecard_ scored a total of 23 Senate votes and 19 House votes, including:**
* The clean energy plan (Inflation Reduction Act), which we counted twice in each chamber to reflect its importance
* Votes to undermine environmental review and public input
* A bill to halt Big Oil price gouging
* Marriage equality and reproductive rights
* Diverse judicial confirmations

Nine out of 100 senators and 84 out of 435 representatives achieved perfect, **100% LCV _Scorecard_ scores**. These members -- all Democrats -- consistently voted to protect our environment, democracy, and communities in 2022. _These heat maps clearly illustrate how Member of Congress from each state or territory scored._
[](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMWbb-GSV/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0) [](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMWbb-GSV/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0)
Counting the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) double in both chambers was a first for this year's _Scorecard_ , but not the only first. **For the first time ever, LCV 's _Scorecard_ included votes in both chambers on a bill to protect same-sex and interracial marriages, which was signed into law, as well as a bill for reproductive rights, which did not pass the Senate.** LCV is committed to safeguarding equity, because we need all members of our society to be able to participate in our democracy and thrive in order to defend the health of our environment. The Senate vote that failed to protect access to reproductive healthcare also serves as a reminder that basic human rights and environmental laws are under threat from the Supreme Court's extremist majority.

Also for the first time this year, the _Scorecard_ includes a section highlighting the leadership of members of the Congressional Black Caucus, Asian Pacific American Caucus, and Hispanic Caucus -- together, the Tri-Caucus -- **whose leadership scored an average of 97% on the 2022** _**Scorecard** _and were instrumental in passing bold climate legislation and working to address environmental injustice and needed democracy reforms.

As in recent years, the _Scorecard_ also includes votes on democracy issues, including votes to advance and confirm historic, personally and professionally diverse judicial nominees. This includes the vote to confirm **Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman on the Supreme Court.**

We also scored votes on the **Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act** , a bill that would restore and expand much-needed voter protections, including against discrimination targeting voters of color, and the **DISCLOSE Act** , a campaign finance reform bill that would provide for greater and faster public disclosure of federal campaign spending and "dark money" contributions.

Even with widespread support, they could not overcome the 60-vote filibuster threshold in the Senate, with Republicans blocking their advance. This democracy vote underscores the partisan divide between Democrats who champion policies that would strengthen and protect our nation's democracy, and Republicans who seek to undermine our electoral systems and weaken voting rights.

Were your members of Congress on the right or wrong side of progress? [Check out their 2022 LCV _Scorecard_ scores now. And thank you for all your support!](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_XXvDQ2/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0)

Onward,

Matthew Davis
Senior Director of Government Affairs
League of Conservation Voters

P.S. Want to help LCV continue this important work? [Chip in a special _Scorecard_ gift today »](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcvyyN-sK/OTE3NHFtaUtVbTdvck54NVlWMFIrcCttK2ozQ1ZpVEV0UG41bXV4cUtnWkphbVRzQjU5TDBFVi9LMFFKNGIzbnVsUFJsSHB2cTM4eG9RWUp4RmRZR1VZanNpMFZVL1dydkY3UC9lcCszUzg9S0/WXNkT1dSWjhycWJ5RHFGWTZzN3RKK2h1d1FyazlqWGdVWllMNWI3d2xxdy8vVGdpNTh4SmY0UDVLUTFiQnhwNE5EVVgwekpFRndsWGlGalA1aGRHeWJlRXZ6ZTJjQU8xS0) __ __ |

---

As in recent years, the Scorecard also includes votes on democracy issues, including votes to advance and confirm historic, personally and professionally diverse judicial nominees. This includes the vote to confirm Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman on the Supreme Court. We also scored votes on the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act , a bill that would restore and expand much-needed voter protections, including against discrimination targeting voters of color, and the DISCLOSE Act** , a campaign finance reform bill that would provide for greater and faster public disclosure of federal campaign spending and "dark money" contributions. Even with widespread support, they could not overcome the 60-vote filibuster threshold in the Senate, with Republicans blocking their advance. This democracy vote underscores the partisan divide between Democrats who champion policies that would strengthen and protect our nation's democracy, and Republicans who seek to undermine our electoral systems and weaken voting rights. Were your members of Congress on the right or wrong side of progress? Onward, Matthew Davis Senior Director of Government Affairs League of Conservation Voters P.S. Want to help LCV continue this important work? | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, . from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback mailto:feedback@lcv.org, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. |

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m not like a lot of other politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59670601/394785348/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzkxNDIxZC1jZmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UULyBDEmdrdkItLKJqiZdhzt3tKhFa_HiLl1LROq9F8=&emci=3e69b0de-ccb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2391421d-cfba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Can I explain something, Peter?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a dirt farmer.**

Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble and seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef and pork. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with big donors and wealthy super PACs in the hopes of a campaign check, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.

[**_That’s why I’m personally asking you to join our team and split $15 between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign today to help us defend and expand our hard-won Senate majority. Anything you can give makes a difference._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59670602/394785349/-1883314608?refcode=20230304.2_JT_3H&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzkxNDIxZC1jZmJhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UULyBDEmdrdkItLKJqiZdhzt3tKhFa_HiLl1LROq9F8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| Team –

As I reach out to voters and supporters across Michigan and the country to secure investments for my re-election campaign, I keep hearing the same thing: folks telling me that they don’t usually get involved in campaigns this early in the cycle.

Believe me, I get it – it can feel like the 2022 election just wrapped up and the 2024 election is ages away. But the truth is that fundraising at this point in the election cycle determines the kinds of long-term investments we’re able to make in crucial resources like campaign staff and voter outreach.

**In short, if we’re going to hold this seat and retake the House majority for Democrats in 2024, we need to be surpassing all of our fundraising goals starting _now._** [_**With that in mind, can I count on you to make a contribution of any amount – even $5 makes a difference! – right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59671399/394788763/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230304-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjY1OWNiYi1kM2JhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dVAXt8lmUo0SoQ2Oftp-QvuBAijcv4bw_rKlaQeGeNI=)

When the clock strikes midnight at the end of this month, our fundraising numbers for the first quarter of 2023 are publicly reported.

_That means everyone, Republican dark money groups included, will see them._

They’ll know if our progressive work in Congress — from veteran care to protecting our democracy from the GOP majority — has support or not.

**That’s why it’s so crucial that our fundraising reports show strength – that we have a huge people‐powered movement behind us.**

[**That’s why I need to hit my End of Quarter goal, Peter. It’s a huge first test of my work this Congress. clean_body: Our campaign finances | = | = When the clock strikes midnight at the end of this month, our fundraising numbers for the first quarter of 2023 are publicly reported. That means everyone, Republican dark money groups included, will see them. They’ll know if our progressive work in Congress — from veteran care to protecting our democracy from the GOP majority — has support or not. That’s why it’s so crucial that our fundraising reports show strength – that we have a huge people‐powered movement behind us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Peter! Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. Derek,

Over the last few days, MAGA extremists have gathered for the annual
Conservative Political Action Conference — featuring the likes of Donald
Trump, Ted Cruz, Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and more. Or the
crazy caucus, as I call them.

It’s the far right’s yearly opportunity to come together and spew lies
about our elections, spread conspiracy theories about President Biden and
his family, and attack those who are defending our democracy, day-in and
day-out. Trump’s keynote speech is tonight, and he’ll undoubtedly do more
of the same.

subject: We have the perfect gift for Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
we think Florida’s far-right governor ought to know
|
---

Team, MSNBC recently called Florida governor Ron DeSantis **“a far more dangerous politician than Donald Trump.”** It’s not hard to see why.

DeSantis’ takeover of Florida’s redistricting process was unprecedented and ruthless. His extremely gerrymandered maps all but guaranteed a Republican House majority and diminished Black representation in Congress.

**Republicans like Ron DeSantis think that politicians should get to pick their voters, instead of the other way around. Sounds like Governor DeSantis could use a present from the NDRC store:** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59671571/394789745/792484209?refcode=EM_RTI_20230304_FR_3B_redlight223_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjODQ1ZGVlLWQ3YmEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BdZSKo-7Rae9cMLxc85xmng2CXqOaMQOfuOu9b1HrsE=&emci=2c9254ed-44b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5c845dee-d7ba-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)

clean_body: we think Florida’s far-right governor ought to know | Team, MSNBC recently called Florida governor Ron DeSantis “a far more dangerous politician than Donald Trump.” It’s not hard to see why. DeSantis’ takeover of Florida’s redistricting process was unprecedented and ruthless. His extremely gerrymandered maps all but guaranteed a Republican House majority and diminished Black representation in Congress. Republicans like Ron DeSantis think that politicians should get to pick their voters, instead of the other way around. Sounds like Governor DeSantis could use a present from the NDRC store: | Treat yourself and your loved ones to a pro-democracy gift – we have plenty of great democracy-defending products in our store, like shirts, tote bags, and stickers. Your purchase will support the NDRC’s ongoing fight to end gerrymandering – and it will send a message to politicians like Ron DeSantis who use anti-democratic tactics to hoard unearned power. – Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.
