name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We care what you think, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Will you take one minute or less to share your thoughts on John’s legislative priorities?
#
Derek,
While John’s name may have been the one on the ticket, our campaign was 100% about YOU.
And now that yinz + youse helped send John to the Senate, **we need your input.**
Our team deeply cares what John's supporters think, which is why we're sharing this survey:
**[Will you take one minute (or less) to share your thoughts on what you think John’s legislative priorities should be? Our team will review each + every response.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022-2/?source=em20230304-1-8276&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022-2/?source=em20230304-8276&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)**
John has never shied away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing our Commonwealth, and he’s in the U.S. Senate to fight for working folks + families.
We're in this together, Derek — so we hope you'll take a moment to take our survey:
**[Can you share your thoughts via our priorities survey? We really want to know what you think John’s top goals should be in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022-2/?source=em20230304-1-8276&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your continued support means so much to our team. 🙏
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230304-8276-footer&t=1&refcode2=8276_434096_sY6fWU&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8276%2E434096%2EsY6fWU)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Social Security, health care, abortion rights, and more are all on the line →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
There’s so much on the line. It’s going to take everyone on this grassroots team to help equip Democrats with the tools they need to defeat the GOP nationwide. | |
---
Derek -- MAGA extremists from around the nation convened this week at the Conservative Political Action Conference where they discussed their disastrous agenda. **Just take a look at some of what’s on the line:**
* **Jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare:** Millions of Americans rely on Medicare and Social Security, but Republicans are making ending these programs as we know it one of their major policy proposals.
* **Cutting the _Affordable Care Act_ and Medicaid:** The GOP’s proposed cuts to the _Affordable Care Act_ , Medicare, and Medicaid would raise health care costs and could leave many without coverage. In fact, it could put 40 million Americans’ health insurance coverage at risk and more than 100 million people with preexisting health conditions could lose critical protections.
* **Extreme Abortion Bans:** Some Republicans are even backing state-level and nationwide abortion bans with no exceptions.

The Republican Party is totally beholden to the extreme MAGA caucus. Grassroots donations can help elect Democrats who will stop them in their tracks, just like this team did before. Chip in $7 to the Red Alert Fund today to join Democrats nationwide in fighting back against the GOP:

clean_body: There’s so much on the line. It’s going to take everyone on this grassroots team to help equip Democrats with the tools they need to defeat the GOP nationwide. | | Derek -- MAGA extremists from around the nation convened this week at the Conservative Political Action Conference where they discussed their disastrous agenda. Just take a look at some of what’s on the line: Jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare: Millions of Americans rely on Medicare and Social Security, but Republicans are making ending these programs as we know it one of their major policy proposals. Cutting the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid: The GOP’s proposed cuts to the Affordable Care Act , Medicare, and Medicaid would raise health care costs and could leave many without coverage. In fact, it could put 40 million Americans’ health insurance coverage at risk and more than 100 million people with preexisting health conditions could lose critical protections. Extreme Abortion Bans: Some Republicans are even backing state-level and nationwide abortion bans with no exceptions. The Republican Party is totally beholden to the extreme MAGA caucus. Grassroots donations can help elect Democrats who will stop them in their tracks, just like this team did before. Chip in $7 to the Red Alert Fund today to join Democrats nationwide in fighting back against the GOP: There’s so much on the line, Derek. It’s going to take everyone on this grassroots team to help equip Democrats with the tools they need to defeat the GOP nationwide. January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried has been sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

“Man who carried a Confederate flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years.”

You’ll notice there isn’t one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden blasted Ken’s carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous."

Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery.

But that didn’t save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What’s worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months – 5 years and 10 months – in prison for his “crimes!”

**Meanwhile, foaming at the mouth radicals in Black Lives Matter and Antifa who’ve rioted, burned down buildings and businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven’t even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I need you on this team, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me explain how we got here.
#
We’ve had a big couple months, Peter.
From launching this campaign on January 6th to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. And now, our first FEC deadline is just around the corner.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can toward our $15,000 weekend goal.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) But first, let me explain a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)
I grew up in Central Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building a people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I want you on this team.[Please add a donation of any amount toward our $15,000 weekend goal right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)
---
Missourians have already proved that they know how to take back their power at the ballot box. So I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
Over the last three election cycles, voters approved measures by big margins to raise the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand healthcare under the Affordable Care Act, and legalize recreational marijuana. So if we’re able to get our message in front of voters early in this race, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley in 2024 and flipping this seat.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can hit our weekend goal and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=15&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=16&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=17&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=18&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=19&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28359?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=20&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28358?refcode=em20230304-2846&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)
---
Together, we can take back power from the corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally take back power for real, everyday people.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230304-2846-footer&t=22&refcode2=2846_614464_qI1zA8&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=2846%2E614464%2EqI1zA8). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.
